 Det är meriterande om du även har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av it-och informationssäkerhetsarbete i större myndighet eller företag
* Certifiering inom it-säkerhetsområdet


**Personliga egenskaper**
 För att lyckas i rollen som It-säkerhetsspecialist ser vi att du har ett it- och informationssäkerhetsmedvetande och en utvecklad analytisk förmåga. Din ansvarstagande förmåga har stor betydelse för gruppens- och verksamhetens resultat. Du har även en god samarbetsförmåga och god förmåga att kommunicera, i tal såväl som i skrift.
   

  

 Vi kommer att lägga stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Kontaktpersoner
   

  

 Har du frågor om uppdraget är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef: 010–5641147
   

  

 Har du frågor gällande rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig HR-konsult: susanna.jalmert@polisen.se
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare
   

  

 Polisförbundet, Sofia Ask, tfn: 010-563 87 10
   

  

 SACO, nås via Polisens växel 114 14
   

  

 SEKO Polisen, Karna Tillheden, tfn: 010-561 66 27
   

  

 ST, nås via Polisens växel 114 14
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Tillsvidareanställning som kan komma att inledas med sex månaders provanställning
   

  

**Anställningen**
 Arbetsort: Stockholm/Kungsholmen
   

  

 Arbetstid: Heltid/dagtid/flextid
   

  

 Funktion: IT Säkerhetspecialist
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna i ditt ansökningsmejl. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Det är därför viktigt att du svarar tydligt och utförligt på frågorna och inte hänvisar till andra handlingar t.ex. CV.
   

  

**Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.**
 Besvara följande urvalsfrågor som en del av din ansökan.
   

  

* Har du akademisk examen där Informations- och IT-säkerhet ingår, eller motsvarande kunskaper inhämtade på annat sätt?


 JA/NEJ om JA beskriv kortfattat.
   

  

* Har du flera års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet inom IT-säkerhet?


 JA/NEJ
   

  

* Har du erfarenhet av att leda och medverka vid IT-säkerhets- och riskanalyser?


 JA/NEJ beskriv kortfattat
   

  

* Har du mycket goda kunskaper i svenska?


 JA/NEJ
   

  

* Har du svenskt medborgarskap?


 JA/NEJ
   

  

* Har du någon Certifiering inom IT-säkerhetsområdet?


 JA/NEJ om JA benämn vilken
   

  

* Har du erfarenhet av IT-säkerhetsarbete i större myndighet eller företag?


 JA/NEJ om JA beskriv kortfattat
   

  

 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.
   

  

 De uppgifter du lämnar i samband med din ansökan kan användas för att kontakta dig, få information och kallelser samt eventuella anställningshandlingar.
   

  

 Urvalstest kan förekomma inom ramen för rekryteringen.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan i form av CV och svar på urvalsfrågor via e-post till jobb.na@polisen.se
 **senast den 2/3 2026.** 
 Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via den mailadress som anges i annonsen.
 **Märk din ansökan med referensnummer A076.556/2026 i mailets ärendemening.**
 Har du skyddade personuppgifter, referenser eller liknande information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd rekommenderar vi att du kontaktar ansvarig HR-konsult innan du går vidare med din ansökan.
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om krigsplacering och säkerhetsprövning under https://polisen.se/krigsplacering och https://polisen.se/sakerhetsprovning
   

  

 Polismyndigheten kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med reglerna i EU:s dataskyddsförordning (2016/679) och annan tillämplig dataskyddsreglering. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter på https://polisen.se/personuppgifter/rekrytering
   

  

 Din ansökan är en allmän handling enligt offentlighetsprincipen.
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Vi undanber oss samtal och mejl från dig som vill sälja annons- och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Sök jobbet
   

  

 Ansök via e-post

title: Product Manager
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
 The role
   

  

 As a Product Manager at Legora, you will own the product vision and drive the development of solutions that create real value for our customers. You’ll work at the intersection of business, tech, and design in a fast-moving B2B environment, with significant influence over both strategy and execution.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Own and evolve the product roadmap aligned with company strategy and customer needs
* Translate business goals and user insights into clear product requirements
* Work closely with engineering, design, sales, and other stakeholders to deliver high-quality products
* Prioritize initiatives based on impact, data, and learning
* Continuously gather feedback and measure outcomes to improve the product


 Who you are
   

  

* An experienced Product Manager in a B2B or SaaS context
* Comfortable making decisions in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment
* Strong communicator who can align stakeholders around a shared vision
* Data-informed, customer-obsessed, and outcome-driven
* Curious, pragmatic, and motivated by building products that matter


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Client Executive
description:
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**
 At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.
   

  

 Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 NetApp is seeking a
 **Client Executive** 
 to expand the Nordics market. This role is ideal for a highly motivated and results-driven professional with a deep understanding of enterprise sales, cloud solutions, data management, and telecommunications.
   

  

 As Client Executive, you will be responsible for driving customer value through NetApp’s portfolio of innovative
 **on-premises and cloud solutions** 
 , developing and executing strategic account plans, identifying new business opportunities. If you have a proven track record of success in enterprise sales, experience managing global accounts, and a passion for driving digital transformation, we encourage you to apply.
   

  

**Job Requirements**
* Develop and oversee implementation of a strategic territory plan to align partners and account team on territory growth strategy
* Develop, manage, and grow a pipeline of sales opportunities with Business Partners and Distributors to drive sales revenue
* Close Cooperation with NetApp and Business Partner resources to create brand awareness, deliver NetApp vision and generate demand in assigned territory
* Actively engage with existing and potential customers from the commercial segment (medium-sized businesses) within a designated sales area, focusing on customer service and new customer acquisition
* Identify potential clients, schedule appointments, conduct effective qualifying sales calls / sales meetings, and manage the sales cycle to successfully close new business.
* Responsible for sales forecasting accuracy, linearity and operational hygiene to achieve business management excellence
* Provide sales support within the partner community to improve communication, collaboration, and accountability specific to pipeline generation and closing opportunities within the assigned territory
* Lead the development and implementation of the strategic Go-to-Market plan for assigned territory ensuring that both internal and external resources are actively engaged &contributing


**Education**
* Bachelor Degree in Business Administration or similar is preferred
* The completion of a commercial apprenticeship and/or professional experience in internal sales
* Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience
* Must speak speak English and Swedish fluently (C1-C2 level)
* Proficient in MS Office (Teams, Outlook, Excel, Word, PowerPoint) and experience in using a CRM too
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, presentation skills, customer service, organizational and negotiation skills
* Self-starter and self-motivated who is comfortable working independently and in a team environment


 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Territory Systems Engineer (Nordics)
description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.
   

  

 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
   

  

 As a Territory Systems Engineer, you will be the trusted technical partner to the Territory Account Executive and our valued Channel Partners. Your role is critical in translating Pure’s vision and innovative solutions into tangible, value-driven technical proposals for a broad and dynamic set of customers. You will play a pivotal part in accelerating growth by ensuring our partners and customers have the technical resources, validation, and support needed to successfully adopt Pure Storage solutions.
   

  

 At Pure, you'll join a culture built on curiosity, innovation, and integrity. We celebrate diverse perspectives, challenge convention, and empower our people to think big, take bold action, and make a measurable impact. This is your opportunity to grow your technical and sales career with one of the most innovative technology companies in the world and do work that truly changes how businesses use data to compete and win.
   

  

**The Role**
 The Territory Systems Engineer (TSE) is a key growth role, focusing on providing essential pre-sales technical support across accounts within a given territory. This position requires a blend of technical acumen, partnership enablement, and a proactive approach to supporting high-volume, transactional sales motions. You will act as the primary technical coach for our partners, empowering them to drive new business and expansion opportunities independently.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Serve as the Technical Brand Ambassador: Act as the primary technical contact alongside the TAE in customer engagements, guiding discussions and showcasing the power and simplicity of Pure's solutions.
* Empower Partner Technical Teams: Guide and activate elite and preferred Partner Systems Engineers (SEs), providing coaching and resources to help them effectively sell, compete, and scale their business with Pure Storage.
* Facilitate Technical Validation: Review and validate sizing, quotes, and technical architectures for various solutions, ensuring accuracy and alignment with customer needs and product capabilities.
* Drive Tool & Resource Adoption: Increase awareness and usage of Pure's sales and technical tools across the partner ecosystem, ensuring they are leveraged effectively at the appropriate stages of the sales cycle.
* Coordinate Technical Enablement: Organize and coordinate technical resources (e.g., specialists, training teams) for partner bootcamps, technical events, and workshops to continuously upskill our channel.
* Resource Management & Escalation: Function as a technical "go-to" advisor for partners, efficiently linking them to virtual resources or properly escalating complex technical inquiries to dedicated Systems Engineers (SEs), the help desk, or Product Technical Marketing (PTM).
* Support Collaborative Growth: Build and maintain strong, productive relationships with both the TAE and Channel Partners to ensure seamless technical support, shared goal achievement, and ultimately, closed deals.


**What You'll Bring**
* Foundational Technical Experience: Professional B2B experience in a technical support, customer-facing, or pre-sales role, demonstrating a solid understanding of technology sales processes.
* Domain Familiarity: Familiarity with the enterprise storage market, data management, and current/emerging IT infrastructure architectures is strongly preferred.
* Collaborative Mindset: Demonstrated success working closely with a sales counterpart (like a TAE) and channel partners to achieve shared business and technical objectives.
* Proactive Drive & Motivation: A high degree of self-motivation, initiative, and the drive to quickly learn complex technical concepts and apply them effectively in a fast-paced environment.
* Strong Communication & Coaching Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to clearly articulate technical value to diverse audiences, from partner SEs to business decision-makers. Fluency in both Swedish and English is required.
* Organizational Resilience: Excellent organizational and time management skills necessary to juggle multiple partner engagements, technical validations, and training support activities in a dynamic territory.


**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Innovation: We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
* Growth: We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
* Team: We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.


 And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company-sponsored team events. Check out purebenefits.com for more information.
   

  

**Accommodations And Accessibility**
 Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at TA-Ops@purestorage.com if you’re invited to an interview.
   

  

**Our Commitment To a Strong And Inclusive Team**
 We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.
   

  

 Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.
   

  

**Join us and bring your best.**
**Bring your bold.**
**Pure and simple.**

title: Client & Consulting Executive
description:
B2C | COPENHAGEN / AARHUS
   

  

**Do you dream of shaping the future for leading consumer brands? At IMPACT, we’re seeking to strengthen our B2C/Retail Client & Consulting muscles to drive transformative growth for our clients, act as a trusted advisor and strategic partner.**
**About The Job**
 This is your unique opportunity to play a central role in defining digital roadmaps, nurturing high-level relationships, and steering complex programs with purpose and clarity. You will own client relationships and lead the charge on consulting engagements, while partnering with C-level leaders (CDOs, CMOs, CIOs, etc.), identifying new growth opportunities and ensuring project success and stakeholder alignment. Working hand-in-hand with our delivery teams, you will help clients unlock the power of digital to meet their ambitions - today as well as into the future.
   

  

 The position at IMPACT is for you, who thrives to
   

  

* Turn ambition into action by designing bold digital strategies and roadmaps that truly move the needle for our clients.
* Lead the charge on high-impact consulting engagements in the fast-evolving worlds of retail, D2C, and omnichannel.
* Fuel growth by spotting and seizing opportunities to expand client partnerships through smart cross- and upselling initiatives.
* Be the trusted voice that digital leaders turn to guiding C-level decision-makers and middle managers alike with confidence and clarity.
* Inspire and align teams by orchestrating complex projects, delegating with purpose, and creating a collaborative, energized environment.
* Pitch ideas that win, shaping standout business proposals that captivate clients and deliver measurable results.
* Own the outcome driving satisfaction, retention, and performance across a portfolio of clients generating €1–5M+ annually.


 YOUR PROFILE
   

  

 You are experienced within leading complex digital commerce transformations, driving strategic consulting across retail, D2C, and omnichannel landscapes, while building strong, trust-based client relationships.
   

  

 Thus, we expect you to demonstrate
   

  

* A strategic mindset with strong communication and analytical skills
* A natural connector who builds trust with clients and teams alike
* Experience with omnichannel, loyalty, personalization, and digital transformation
* Proven ability to drive business development and innovation


 We imagine you have 5-8 years' experience in management consulting or project/program leadership with a strong focus on Commerce. Additionally, you could have an educational background within IT, business, finance, or management (BSc or MSc).
   

  

 Finally, we are looking for a colleague and team member who can contribute to a fun and professional work environment at IMPACT while ensuring a high standard in collaboration with your colleagues.
   

  

 LIFE AT IMPACT
   

  

 For more than 20 years, IMPACT has pioneered some of the most advanced commerce solutions in the Nordics. What started in Aarhus, Denmark has grown into a European powerhouse with offices across the world.
   

  

 While we cover all the major tech platforms and work with some of the most exciting businesses, we make a sincere effort to stay down-to-earth. It’s who we are, and it’s the kind of talent we want to attract. We empower people and businesses to drive positive change and quality experiences, and we’re not afraid to take the lead on shaping the future of commerce.
   

  

 Today, we’re a global team of digital talents working to strategize, craft, and support all things tech. We push the boundaries for commerce with curiosity, ambition, and empowerment that cements the ambition to
 **change commerce for the better** 
 . But it’s not all about size. Because more than anything, we want to maintain our collective can-do attitude that creates a working environment where everything is possible – and have fun while doing it.
   

  

 CONTACT
   

  

 Sound like an opportunity for you? Send your CV via the link below.
   

  

 Interviews are held on an ongoing basis, as the position is to be filled as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact Executive Search Specialist Christian Kerrn-Jespersen +45 23299249.
   

  

 We are looking forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 For more than 20 years, IMPACT has pioneered some of the most advanced commerce solutions in the Nordics. What started in Aarhus, Denmark has grown into a European powerhouse with offices across the world.
   

  

 Today, we’re a global team of digital talents working to strategize, craft, and support all things tech. We push the boundaries for commerce with curiosity, ambition, and empowerment that cements the ambition to
 **change commerce for the better** 
 . But it’s not all about size. Because more than anything, we want to maintain our collective can-do attitude that creates a working environment where everything is possible – and have fun while doing it.

title: Project Manager | ERP Delivery Manager
description:
**Summary**
 Introduction:
   

  

 Do you always deliver what you've promised? So do we! At the heart of every great technology solution are great people who always make sure the project delivers what it set out to do and matches expectations.  You’re a proactive and eager-to-act individual contributor who loves solving problems with technology and using your good interpersonal and organizational skills to build positive relationships. We’ll surround you with people who are as passionate about technology and innovation as you are.
   

  

**Come Join Us**
 ERP is all about helping businesses simplify complexity and thrive in the digital age. You’ll be solving your client’s challenges and turning their needs into goals and solutions through Microsoft Dynamics 365. Working as part of the ERP team you’ll collect information, analyze requirements and solve problems, providing technical and operational support. Together we do what matters.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 With the role of Project Manager in ERP you will be responsible for the success of our projects, organizing, managing and monitoring work teams, methodologies and technologies, from the requirements analysis phase to the project delivery phase to client companies.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Key responsabilities**
* Previous experience in the role of project manager for ERP system implementations
* Knowledge of PM methodologies (Agile, Waterfall)
* Ability to set deadlines, assign responsibilities to work teams, and monitor the progress of activities.
* Ability to relate effectively with internal and external customers.
* PMI certification will be considered an asset.


**About You**
* Characteristics that can spell success for this role:
* Consultative, collaborative, relationship builder
* Resilient, adaptable, flexible
* Intellectually curious and passionate about tech
* Convincing storyteller and engaging content creator

title: AI Engineering Manager
description:
We are on a mission to become the leading international force in residential property management. What we do matters to billions of people in their everyday lives.
   

  

 Residential real estate is the world’s largest asset class, and for most families, buying a home is the single biggest financial decision they will ever make. For too long, residential property management has fallen short of homeowners' and residents' expectations, and the industry is ready for change. Odevo was formed to make that change happen.
   

  

 In just six years, Odevo has grown more than 70-fold, establishing us as the leading international player. We are more than 12,000 people across the US, the UK, the Nordics, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Mexico, and Italy building Odevo. Together, we aspire to break new ground through innovation and cultivate a workplace where we help each other succeed, where ideas matter more than titles, and where kindness is a strength.
   

  

 By combining the power of people and technology, we set a new standard for how homes are managed. Our technology-enabled services simplify living for residents and create a better experience for property owners and boards.
   

  

 Our ambition is to continue our fast-growing journey through new customers, service expansion, and by partnering with great companies that share our mindset and ambition, both in existing and new markets.
   

  

 As we continue to grow, we stay true to who we are, challenge unnecessary bureaucracy, and keep decision-making close to our customers.
   

  

 If you share our mindset and ambition, we’d love you to join us and help accelerate our mission together.
   

  

**The Role**
 Are you a passionate and experienced leader with a deep interest in AI and a drive to build high-performing teams? We are seeking an Engineering Manager to lead and inspire a team of talented AI Engineers in developing cutting-edge, AI-driven solutions.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to be at the forefront of innovation, shaping how our organization leverages the power of AI to revolutionize the property management industry. You will foster a culture of collaboration, creativity, and technical excellence while guiding your team to deliver impactful results.
   

  

 You will lead a Stockholm-based team of eight AI Engineers, with additional hiring underway, working in a hybrid setup with three days per week in the office.
   

  

 You will be reporting to the Head of Engineering and work closely with the Head of AI Product.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Will Include**
**Team Leadership and Development**
* Lead by example as a hands-on engineering manager, able to dive into design discussions, code reviews, and experimentation when it adds value.
* Foster a collaborative, high-performing, and innovative engineering culture within the AI team.
* Mentor, coach, and empower engineers at different seniority levels, supporting both technical depth and growth.
* Own the full performance and development cycle for your team, from setting clear expectations and goals to giving regular, actionable feedback and performance reviews.
* Build and maintain a healthy, inclusive team environment, addressing challenges early and enabling people to do their best work.
* Partner with recruitment to attract, assess, and onboard experienced AI Engineers.


**Strategy and Cross-functional Collaboration**
* Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders to define and evolve the technical roadmap and strategy for AI initiatives.
* Translate product and business objectives into a clear set of priorities for the AI team, ensuring strong alignment with the overall product vision.
* Represent the AI team in engineering forums and strategic planning sessions, clearly communicating progress, risks, and trade-offs.
* Stay informed about emerging AI trends and technologies and bring relevant insights into high-level technical discussions and long-term planning.


**Who You Are**
* You are a proven leader with a passion for AI and a track record of building and managing high-performing engineering teams.
* You possess strong communication and interpersonal skills, capable of effectively collaborating with both technical and non-technical colleagues.
* You are a strategic thinker with a pragmatic approach, able to translate complex business requirements into actionable technical solutions.


**Qualifications**
* Significant experience in leading and managing software engineering teams
* Solid background in hands-on software development
* Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
* Professional proficiency in Swedish and English, given our interactions with colleagues across the globe.
* Deep interest in AI and how it’s changing our world.
* Experience with our tech environment (Cloud services/AWS/GCP, Python/FastAPI, LLMs like GPT-5/Gemini/Claude) is a plus, but not mandatory.


**What We Offer**
* Professional growth - to work with the most talented developers in the industry.
* Modern technology - we invest in the latest technologies and tools and encourage our team members to share their ideas and take ownership of their work.
* Innovation - to work on exciting projects that push the boundaries of our industry and make a real impact.
* Commitment to quality - a dynamic and forward-thinking company that values profitable and long-term product development.


 #msl

title: Internship - Publicis Media (Specialist Department PMX)
description:
**Company Description**
*Publicis Groupe is one of the largest communications groups in the world. We are building the agency model of the future and take a holistic approach to our clients’ challenges. By fusing together our media, creative, data and technology expertise, we are able to provide clients with integrated solutions, transformative ideas and compelling consumer experiences. We call it the Power of One.
   

  

 We are proud winner of many awards and nominations, both in Sweden and internationally. But nothing makes us prouder than to work with clients and brands such as P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault and many more.
   

  

 At Publicis, we put our people first. We are proud to be certified by Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) and have won the Diversity Charter Sweden Awards in the category Mental Health (2025). We have also been recognized with a Magnet Award for our engaging culture (2023). Our goal is to become the leading workplace in our industry. We are based in a fantastic office in Odenplan and offer a flexible work policy.*
**Overview**
**Are you passionate about media and marketing and eager to kick-start your career in the industry?** 
 Join Publicis Media as an intern in one of our specialist departments and gain hands-on experience working with some of the best talent in the business. We are currently looking for full-time interns for during the spring 2026.
   

  

**About PMX**
 PMX (Publicis Media Exchange) is the specialist hub within Publicis Media, dedicated to delivering advanced media solutions and strategic partnerships. We combine expertise in programmatic advertising, social media and influencer marketing, search (SEM and SEO), video, audio and out-of-home, as well as investment and trading. Our mission is to help global and local brands navigate today’s fast-changing media landscape through data-driven strategies, creativity, and innovation. By leveraging cutting-edge tools and insights, PMX ensures our clients stay ahead in a competitive market.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**About the Role**
 As an intern, you will support our specialist teams with
 **operational, entry-level tasks** 
 within the systems and platforms we use daily. You’ll be part of a team of talented specialists at varying levels of seniority, giving you the chance to
 **learn from industry experts** 
 while contributing to real projects throughout your internship. You’ll also be given
 **projects to own and develop** 
 , ensuring your time with us is impactful and rewarding.
   

  

**While you’ll have a clear belonging to one department, you’ll also have opportunities to c** 
 ollaborate with
 **other specialist teams** 
 and participate in
 **cross-functional activities** 
 for a broader industry introduction. You will most likely engage with our partners such as Google, Meta, TikTok, Schibsted, Acast and many more.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 We provide a
 **structured onboarding program** 
 designed to introduce you to the tools, platforms & internal processes we use on a daily basis. Throughout your internship, you’ll gain
 **hands-on experience in campaign activation and platform operations** 
 , giving you practical insight into the media industry. You’ll also be exposed to
 **leading technologies and partnerships** 
 . In addition, we offer a
 **dynamic and supportive environment** 
 where you can take part in networking opportunities, team activities, and learning sessions to help you grow both professionally and personally.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Who We’re Looking For**
* You are studying or have recently completed studies in media, marketing, communication, data analytics, or E-commerce.
* You are curious, proactive, and eager to learn.
* You have an interest in AI, media and emerging technologies.
* Understanding data-driven decision-making and analytics is highly valuable for media optimization and reporting.
* You thrive in a collaborative team environment while remaining highly effective when working independently.


 This internship is based at our Stockholm office and requires full on-site presence to ensure close collaboration and hands-on learning with our team.
   

  

**Additional Information**
**How to Apply**
 When applying, please state which specialist department you are most interested in.
   

  

* Programmatic
* Social
* Influencer
* SEM & SEO
* Video & Audio
* OOH & Print
* Investment & Trading


 This helps us match you with the right team and ensure you get the most out of your internship.

title: Team Leader Data Management
description:
Every day, we get opportunities to make a positive impact – on our colleagues, partners, customers and society. Together, we’re pioneering the solutions of the future and unlocking the full potential of precious resources. Trusted to act on initiative, we challenge conventional thinking to develop world-leading technologies that inspire progress in vital areas, including energy, food, water and shipping.
   

  

 As we push forward, the innovative, open spirit that fuels our 140-year-old start-up culture and rapid growth also drives our personal growth. So, as we shape a more resourceful, less wasteful world, we build our careers too.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Parts Distribution and Logistics (PDL) in Alfa Laval has the main responsibility of distributing spare parts to our sales companies and end customers through our Distribution Centres around the world. We are now looking a Team Lead for the PDL Data Management Team! You’ll play a pivotal role in our transformation journey, shaping how we work with data management across PDL – and the system landscape.
   

  

 Are you ready to lead the way in data excellence? Join us on an exciting change journey as we implement a new ERP system!
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead Data Management: Oversee PDL data across ERP and business systems, ensuring accuracy and integrity.
* Data Quality & Governance: Develop and implement best practices for data governance, proactively monitor and resolve data errors.
* Change & Test Management: Drive test and change management processes, especially during D365 ERP implementation and continuous improvement.
* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with other departments to align processes and maintain data integrity.
* Team Leadership: Motivate, guide, and develop the team through transformation and adoption of new technologies.


**Who You Are**
* Open-minded and enthusiastic about new ways of working
* Embraces change and inspires others to do the same
* Strong team motivator and collaborator across departments
* Analytical mindset – able to identify data quality issues and propose practical solutions
* Excellent communicator and relationship builder


**What You Know & Key Qualifications**
* Proven experience in data management within complex data environments
* High-level data expertise (SQL, data modeling, data governance)
* Experience with ERP systems (Microsoft Dynamics 365 - must have & Movex Pulse - nice to have), advanced planning systems, and reporting systems (Power BI)
* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Data Science, or related field
* Team Lead experience is highly beneficial and will be considered a strong advantage


 What's in it for You?
   

  

* Be part of a organization that is a global leader in sustainable solutions
* Drive real change and shape the future of data management in logistics


**For more information, please contact**
 Jonas Wikbladh, Supply chain planning Manager, PDL, jonas.wikbladh@alfalaval.com
   

  

 Olena Mykytsey, Senior Talent Acquisition Partner, olena.mykytsey@alfalaval.com
   

  

**Union information**
 Axel Scharing, Akademikerna, axel.scharing@alfalaval.com
   

  

 Anders Jansson, Unionen, anders.jansson@alfalaval.com
   

  

 We review applications continually so please send in yours as soon as possible and not later than
 **March 27th, 2026.** 
 We may close the application process earlier if the final candidate is identified.
   

  

 Please note that, in compliance with GDPR, we cannot accept applications submitted via email.
   

  

*We care about diversity, inclusion, and equity in our recruitment processes. We also believe behavioral traits can provide important insights into a candidate's fit to a role. To help us achieve this we apply Pymetrics assessments, and upon application you will be invited to play the assessment games.*

title: Strategic Account Manager
description:
As a Strategic Account Manager at Upsales, you operate where technology, customer value, and long-term growth meet. Your mission is to help existing customers realize the full potential of Upsales by translating AI capabilities into measurable outcomes across their revenue operations.
   

  

 Upsales is not just a CRM. We are Europe’s leading AI platform for B2B revenue acceleration. Founded in Stockholm and built for high-performing revenue teams, we help ambitious companies work smarter, predict better, and scale with precision. Our culture is shaped by ownership, craftsmanship, and an AI-first mindset.
   

  

 In this role, you work cross-functionally with Solutions Engineers, Onboarding, and Customer Success to deeply understand each customer’s setup, goals, and challenges. You act as a trusted advisor, connecting product capabilities with real-world use cases. This is about long-term value creation, not transactional selling.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Take ownership of a strategic portfolio of existing customers with a focus on adoption, value realization, and sustainable expansion
* Develop a deep understanding of customer workflows, data maturity, and business objectives
* Identify opportunities where Upsales’ AI and platform capabilities can unlock new value
* Co-create solution designs and success plans together with Solutions Engineers and Customer Success
* Lead strategic account dialogues, roadmap discussions, and executive-level conversations
* Drive expansion through demonstrated impact, not pressure or volume
* Collaborate with Product, Customer Success, and Sales leadership to continuously improve how we deliver customer value
* Contribute to ARR growth by helping customers scale successfully with Upsales over time


**AI first mindset**
 We’re not looking for someone who simply uses AI. We want someone who weaponizes it. You treat tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI copilots as force multipliers, allowing you to deliver at a level and speed others can’t match. For you, AI isn’t an add-on, it’s the default operating system for how you think, work, and lead. You’re relentlessly curious about new capabilities, and you push the limits of what’s possible, turning AI into a competitive advantage for yourself, Upsales, and our customers. This is a role for someone with real ambition: someone who wants to set a new standard for efficiency, precision, and impact in the age of AI.
   

  

 Who We’re Looking For
   

  

* At least 5 years of proven experience in complex B2B sales
* A strong track record of meeting and exceeding targets
* Experience building long-term relationships with fast-growing mid-sized companies
* A proactive, ambitious mindset with full ownership of the sales process
* Excellent communication skills in both English and Swedish
* Driven by growth, responsibility, and the ambition to build something meaningful


 You are not looking for just another role. You are looking for momentum.
   

  

 Upsales is a bootstrapped company with big ambitions, known for our high-performing team, relentless curiosity, and a culture that challenges conventional thinking. From product to sales, we’re obsessed with creating real value for our customers and building software that actually moves the needle.

title: Utvecklare inom mobila lösningar
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vill du vara med och utveckla nästa generations mobilapplikationer – och samtidigt skapa verklig nytta för några av Sveriges mest spännande företag inom industri, transport och bygg? Då är CGI rätt arbetsplats för dig!
   

  

 Hos oss på CGI får du arbeta i teknikens framkant när det gäller kompetensutveckling och ny teknik – för att kunna stötta våra kunder i den digitala transformationens snabba förändringstakt.
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Som utvecklare av mobila lösningar blir du en viktig del av ett team som designar, utvecklar och förvaltar mobilapplikationer för både iOS och Android. Du arbetar nära UX/UI-designers, backend-utvecklare och produktägare för att skapa användarvänliga, prestandaeffektiva och säkra applikationer – ofta i projekt som påverkar stora delar av våra kunders verksamheter.
   

  

 Hos oss får du:
   

  

* Arbeta med både native (Swift, SwiftUI, Java) och cross-plattform-lösningar (.NET MAUI, hybridappar).
* Samarbeta tvärfunktionellt med UX/UI-designers, backend-utvecklare och produktägare.
* Hantera publicering till App Store och Google Play.
* Delta i DevOps-arbete och bidra till CI/CD-pipelines för mobila applikationer.
* Säkerställa hög kodkvalitet och en trygg användarupplevelse genom testdriven utveckling.


 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

 Vi tror att du har minst fyra års erfarenhet av mobilutveckling, men viktigast är din vilja att lära, dela kunskap och ta ansvar för helheten, från idé till slutprodukt.
   

  

 Du har även:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av minst en mobilplattform (iOS, Android eller cross-plattform).
* Kunskap om RESTful API, databaser (SQL, NoSQL), och Azure.
* Förståelse för säkerhet i mobilappar (OAuth, JWT, användardata).
* Vana vid arkitekturmönster som MVVM och Clean Architecture.
* Erfarenhet av agila metoder (Scrum, Agile).


 För att trivas och lyckas i rollen tror vi att du drivs av att skapa lösningar med hög kvalitet och stark användarupplevelse. Du har en naturlig nyfikenhet på ny teknik och ett genuint intresse för att förstå användarnas behov. Du arbetar självständigt men uppskattar det agila samarbetet med kollegor, där kunskapsdelning och gemensamt ansvar för resultatet är en självklarhet. Du tycker om att bidra till teamets utveckling, coacha andra och vara en aktiv del i tekniska beslut.
   

  

 I rollen har du möjlighet att arbeta både in-house och hos kund, beroende på projekt.
   

  

 Vill du vara med och skapa digitala lösningar som gör verklig skillnad – i en miljö där du får växa, påverka och trivas? Välkommen till CGI!
   

  

**Vill du veta mer?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig! Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan i dag! Om du har frågor om rollen, hör gärna av dig till rekryterande ledare Annika Widell, Director Consulting Services/ Konsultchef, på annika.widell@cgi.com
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Senior Project Manager - WorkplaceX Design & Build
description:
The Workplace Experience team (
 **WorkplaceX** 
 ) enables Spotifiers to do their best work by delivering an inspiring and frictionless workplace.
   

  

 We are looking for an outstanding
 **Senior Project Manager** 
 to join our Design & Build team. In this exciting role, you will be responsible for the full project lifecycle and will run projects that transform our offices globally.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Project Lifecycle Management
* Scope & Requirements: Collaborate with diverse business functions to gather workplace requirements that balance business objectives with functional needs.
* Financial & Timeline Control: Own the scope, schedule, and budget for all assigned projects.
* Risk Mitigation: Proactively identify and address project risk areas, including logistical issues, timing, budget, and scope.
* Performance Monitoring: Actively supervise every aspect of project performance against schedules and critical paths, including on-site construction monitoring.
* Technical Excellence & Design
* Design Advocacy: Maintain a pursuit for high-quality workplace design and understand how it drives performance.
* Standards Integration: Incorporate established workplace design and performance guidelines into every build.
* Building Systems Coordination: Manage the coordination of all building installations and integrations, including structural, MEP, and AV systems.
* Planning & Compliance: Oversee space planning concepts and navigate landlord-associated applications and technical requirements.
* Ecosystem & Vendor Orchestration
* Stakeholder Leadership: Facilitate meetings with upper management and collaborate with partner teams including Real Estate, IT, HR, Legal, and Procurement.
* Procurement Management: Coordinate Vendor RFPs, write detailed Scopes of Work (SOWs), and negotiate contracts with contractors and subcontractors.
* Project Administration: Prepare project status updates, process invoices, and maintain all files for due diligence and financials.
* Consultant Coordination: Direct the activities of external consultants and technical sub-contractors.


 Who You Are
   

  

* Experienced: 5+ years of meaningful work experience, with your most recent role as a full Project Manager in office transformation or a similar field.
* Educated: Bachelor’s Degree required; a degree in Architecture, Planning, Engineering, or Construction Management is preferred.
* Technical: Familiar with architectural drawings, space management solutions, and the use of Project Manager software tools.
* Global Mindset: Experience working globally with a strong understanding of different international building systems.
* Communicator: Proficient in spoken and written English with the ability to lead partner meetings and create clear presentations.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home. We ask that you come in > 3 times per week.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Senior fullstackutvecklare C#/Javascript/SQL till team Produce - Ving
description:
**Till Ving söker vi en skicklig och driven fullstackutvecklare som vill vara en del av ett team där kvalitet, samarbete och teknisk innovation står i fokus.** 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Vi söker en fullstackutvecklare till team Produce. Teamet ansvarar för system som hanterar hotell, flyg och tillval. Det innefattar bland annat system för att planera, producera, optimera och hantera flygkapacitet och avgångar, både för kommande och pågående säsonger. Teamet bygger och ansvarar för flera affärskritiska system.
 



  





 Teamets teknikstack innefattar bland annat:
 


* C#
* SQL
* Redis
* Azure Service Bus
* React
* Azure



  





 Hos oss jobbar vi agilt i snabba releasecykler och med continuous delivery. Teamen ansvarar för hela kedjan – från kravförståelse och utveckling till driftsättning, förvaltning och support. Vår strategi är ”Cloud first”, vilket gör att vi värdesätter kunskap om molnlösningar och Azure.
 



 Tillsammans med teamet får du stort inflytande över arkitektur, skalning och prestanda i våra egenutvecklade system.
 



  





 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
 


* Samverka med stakeholders för att förstå behov och krav
* Designa och utveckla lösninga
* Säkerställa kvalitet genom t.ex. kodgranskningar och tester
* Automatisera infrastruktur och releaseflöden i Azure med IaC (Bicep m.m.), CI/CD samt observability practices
* Arbeta tillsammans med andra team för att leverera på helheten



  





**Vår tekniska miljö** 




 Vi är 13 utvecklingsteam på IT-avdelningen i Stockholm som tillsammans driver utvecklingen framåt. Våra system byggs i en modern Microsoft-miljö och vi arbetar med aktuella tekniker, ramverk och verktyg som .NET Core, C#, Node, Azure, React, React Native, JavaScript, GraphQL, MS SQL och Redis.
 



  





 I linje med vår cloud-first-strategi satsar vi på skalbara och framtidssäkra lösningar där innovation, prestanda och kvalitet alltid står i fokus.
 



 Läs mer om
 **vår IT-avdelning här** 
 🧑 💻
 



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Vi söker dig som är nyfiken, noggrann och kommunikativ, och som trivs med att arbeta tillsammans med andra. Du brinner för kodning, ser värdet i samarbete för att nå gemensamma mål och tycker det är viktigt att förstå den verksamhet vi stöttar. Du har förmåga att arbeta proaktivt, se helheten och driva utvecklingen framåt.
 



 Du har en god förmåga att kommunicera och samarbeta med dina kollegor, dela kunskap och bidra till en öppen och lärande kultur.
 



 Vi söker en lagspelare som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap, stöttar kollegor och bidrar till en öppen och lärande kultur. Vi värdesätter om du har intresse för DevOps och tycker om att arbeta med frågor som rör automatisering, CI/CD och infrastruktur som kod.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer:** 



* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av systemutveckling inom C#/.NET
* Intresse av arkitektur
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade tjänster (gärna Azure)
* Erfarenhet av React eller liknande
* Relevant högskole- eller universitetsutbildning
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila team
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift



  





**Meriterande** 



* Azure kompetens
* Erfarenhet av att automatisera infrastruktur och releaseflöden i Cloudmiljö (IaC, CI/CD)
* Erfarenhet av övervakning och monitorering
* Testdriven utveckling (TDD)
* Parprogrammering
* Intresse för generativ AI och förmåga att driva frågor inom området
* Erfarenhet av DevOps och förmåga att driva frågor inom området



  





**Vi erbjuder** 




 Vi erbjuder en spännande och utvecklande miljö. Du får en omväxlande vardag tillsammans med härliga kollegor - vi arbetar i nära samarbete med andra team och verksamheten för att ge våra gäster de bästa veckorna på året. Vi har ett högt medarbetarengagemang och en härlig kultur. Vi älskar vårt jobb och välkomnar dig ombord på vår resa i Nordic Leisure Travel Group!
 



 Läs mer om
 **vad vi erbjuder här** 
 🏄
 



  





**Övrigt** 




 Tjänsten är en heltidstjänst och placerad på Vings fina huvudkontor på Kungsholmen i Stockholm. Det är möjligt med distansarbete upp till 2 dagar per vecka när det passar för teamet/arbetsuppgiften.
 



  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
 



  





**I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av tester från Alva Labs – ett logiskt problemlösningstest och ett personlighetstest. Testerna utgår från vedertagen forskning och ger oss möjlighet att på ett mer objektivt sätt bedöma dina styrkor och eventuella utmaningar i relation till aktuell tjänst. Du får mer information när du skickat in din ansökan, men om du är nyfiken redan nu kan du läsa mer hos** 
**Alva Labs** 
**.** 




  





**Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en bakgrundskontroll att genomföras.** 




  





**🏄 ♂️ Kul på jobbet** 




**🤝 Tjänstepension** 




**🌎 Reseförmåner** 




**🦉 Utveckling och lärande** 




**💗 Well-being** 




**💼 Hybrid arbetsplats** 




  





  





*Ving ingår i den nordiska resekoncernenNordic Leisure Travel Group.* 




*I gruppen ingår researrangörerna Ving Sverige, Ving Norge, Globetrotter, Spies i Danmark, Tjäreborg i Finland, flygbolaget Sunclass Airlines samt våra egna hotellkoncept Sunwing Family Resorts, Ocean Beach Club och Sunprime Hotels. Gruppen säljer ett normalt år runt 1 250 000 resor i de nordiska länderna.*

title: Atlassian Sales Executive – Sweden
description:
**About The Role**
 HiQ Sweden is looking for a driven and business-oriented Sales representative who wants to build and lead a new strategic business area connected to our global partner, Atlassian. HiQ is currently a Platinum Partner in Germany and is now entering a rapid expansion phase of its Atlassian offering in Sweden. You will play a key role in establishing and growing our Swedish services portfolio within Atlassian – from initial customer contact to closed deal.
   

  

 This role is for someone who is passionate about sales, has proven experience within the Atlassian ecosystem, and wants to shape something entirely new within an organization that has a strong brand, high competence, and international reach.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Sales
   

  

* Own all sales of Atlassian products, services, and solutions in the Swedish market.
* Drive the entire sales process – from prospecting, needs analysis, and solution design to proposal, negotiation, and closing.
* Collaborate closely with HiQ’s Atlassian Center of Expertise in Germany to leverage the group’s capacity, expertise, and delivery capabilities.


 Partnership & Business development
   

  

* Develop and maintain strong relationships with Atlassian as a partner and ensure HiQ remains top-of-mind in relevant channels and customer segments Build and develop HiQ’s Swedish services portfolio related to Atlassian.
* Identify new market opportunities and contribute to business strategy, service packaging, and go-to-market plans.
* Work closely with HiQ’s broader sales force, account managers, and consulting managers to create synergies and maximize business opportunities.
* Represent HiQ at customer meetings, events, trade fairs, and partner activities


**Qualifications**
* Proven experience selling Atlassian products, licenses, and/or services based on a solid understanding of the Atlassian ecosystem, such as Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, Jira Service Management, and Marketplace apps.
* Several years of B2B sales experience within IT, tech, or consulting services and Enterprise-capable i.e. ability to engage with C-suite stakeholders.
* Experience managing the full sales cycle independently – from prospecting to closed deal. Experience in generating and managing large deals in region
* Proven ability to partner with technical leads to convert technical capability into commercial outcomes.
* Experience working closely with partners and vendors, preferably Atlassian specifically.
* Demonstrated ability to plan and execute with internal and external teams.
* Meritorious: Experience building new business areas or launching new service offerings.


**Personal Attributes**
 We are looking for someone who combines strong business acumen with energy and collaboration skills. To succeed in this role, you are:
   

  

* A team player who enjoys collaborating closely with colleagues in Sweden and internationally.
* Confident in customer dialogues and skilled at building trust.
* Results-oriented with a strong drive to achieve.
* Proactive, self-driven, and comfortable working in a build-up phase.
* Strong communicator and relationship-oriented – working proactively with stakeholders both internally and externally.
* Motivated to learn and apply the Atlassian solution-selling approach.
* Structured and accustomed to prioritizing in a dynamic environment.
* Curious, eager to learn, and interested in staying up to date with Atlassian’s product development.
* Strategically minded with the ability to see the bigger picture and identify new opportunities.
* You speak fluent Swedish and English.


**Why HiQ?**
 At HiQ, you will have the opportunity to:
   

  

* Build a new business area.
* Work in a company with a strong culture, high competence, and a clear growth agenda.
* Collaborate with an international Atlassian expert team in Germany.
* Influence both strategy and operations in an ambitious expansion initiative.
* Work with forward-thinking customers within digitalization, software development, and modern ways of working.

title: Marketing Automation Specialist
description:
Vill du bygga nästa generations datadrivna kundresor i ett av Nordens ledande B2B handelsföretag? Bemästrarar du strategi likväl som att sätta upp flöden, segment och tester? Då kan det vara dig vi söker till denna spännande roll!
   

  

 Varmt välkommen att söka till Ahlsells marknadsavdelning!
   

  

**Om rollen som Marketing Automation Specialist**
 Som Marketing Automation Specialist hos Ahlsell får du en central roll i vår digitala och kunddrivna utveckling. Du ansvarar för att utveckla, implementera och optimera automatiserade kundresor som stärker kundupplevelsen, ökar lojaliteten och driver mätbara affärsresultat. Du arbetar nära marknad, e-handel, försäljning och IT för att säkerställa en relevant, personaliserad och sömlös upplevelse genom hela kundresan, med hjälp av marketing automation, kunddata och AI.
   

  

 Det här är en roll för dig som vill kombinera analys, teknik, AI och affärsförståelse, och se tydlig effekt av det du bygger.
   

  

**Ditt främsta fokus kommer ligga vid att**
* Designa, implementera och optimera automatiserade kundresor baserat på affärsmål och KPI:er
* Bygga och vidareutveckla segmentering, beteendestyrda triggers och lead scoring-modeller
* Utveckla omnikanalflöden som stärker relationen genom hela kundlivscykeln
* Driva A/B-tester och löpande optimera kampanjer baserat på data och insikter
* Optimera budskap och innehåll i kundresor för att maximera engagemang och konvertering, inklusive att själv kunna producera och anpassa enklare copy och innehåll
* Säkerställa datakvalitet, struktur och GDPR-efterlevnad i alla flöden
* Bidra i utveckling och eventuell upphandling av MA-plattform
* Utforska och implementera AI-baserade lösningar för personalisering och prediktiv analys där det skapar affärsvärde


****Är du den vi söker?****
 Vi söker dig som kombinerar analysförmåga med handlingskraft. Du trivs med att ta ägarskap och har en god förmåga att driva initiativ hela vägen från idé till genomförande. Du är trygg i att arbeta tvärfunktionellt, kan skapa samsyn och omsätta komplex data till tydliga insikter som leder till riktning och beslut. Samtidigt är du en pedagogisk och förtroendeingivande person som trivs i en organisation där arbetssätt och strukturer utvecklas i takt med affären.
   

  

 Framför allt motiveras du av att skapa lösningar som gör konkret skillnad – både för kundupplevelsen och affären!
   

  

**För Att Lyckas i Rollen Behöver Du**
* Ha flera års erfarenhet av Marketing Automation och CRM i en datadriven miljö
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med segmentering, automatiserade flöden och konverteringsoptimering
* En god förståelse för kunddata, kundresor och personalisering
* Erfarenhet av tvärfunktionellt samarbete och förmåga att skapa framdrift i miljöer med många intressenter
* Vara trygg i att arbeta mot tydliga KPI:er och affärsmål
* Ha en relevant eftergymnasial utbildning
* Kunna kommunicera obehindrat på svenska och engelska


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du Dessutom Har**
* Erfarenhet från B2B, retail eller omnikanal
* Arbetat i en större eller komplex organisation
* Erfarenhet av analysverktyg som Matomo, Google Analytics eller liknande
* Förståelse för systemintegrationer och datamodellering


**Därför ska du välja Ahlsell**
 Vi har sedan starten vuxit oss stora, idag är vi marknadsledande, men behållit vår entreprenörsanda. Hos oss säljer vi inte bara produkter, utan erbjuder också våra kunder effektiva logistiklösningar och tjänster som skapar värde i deras processer. Här blir du en del av Sveriges största säljorganisation. Vi får ofta höra att vi är vänliga och tillmötesgående, det gör oss stolta. Vi tar vår position på allvar och arbetar för att bidra till att göra det enklare att bygga ett bättre och mer hållbart samhälle. Våra medarbetare beskriver Ahlsell som en arbetsplats där samarbetet och teamkänslan med kollegor är stark.
   

  

 På Ahlsell får du arbeta i en organisation med höga ambitioner inom digital utveckling, kundupplevelse och hållbarhet, där din insats gör verklig skillnad. Här kombinerar vi en varm kultur med starkt affärsfokus och viljan att förbättra och förenkla kundens vardag.
   

  

 Läs mer om vad det innebär att jobba på Ahlsell - Om Ahlsell | Jobba hos oss
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi arbetar med kompetensbaserad rekrytering och använder tester som en del av processen för att bidra till detta. Urvalet sker löpande under denna rekrytering så vänta därför inte med att skicka in din ansökan, dock senast
 **15 mars 2026.**
 Tjänsten är tillsvidare med 6 månaders provanställning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Har du frågor om rollen eller rekryteringsprocessen?**
 Tveka inte att höra av dig till rekryterande chef Malin Brant-Lundin, malin.brant-lundin@ahlsell.se eller ansvarig HR-partner Emilia Miller, emilia.miller@ahlsell.se
   

  

 Fackliga representanter hos Unionen når du via Lena Bergman, lena.bergman@ahlsell.se
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan – vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!**

title: Director Consulting Expert - SAP
description:
Working as a Director Consulting Expert at CGI means a varied and dynamic role in which you play a key part in further developing and growing our SAP business. You will work closely with both clients and internal teams to identify new business opportunities, strengthen our market offering, and position CGI as a leading SAP partner.
   

  

 The role combines strategic thinking with a strong operational and services delivery focus. You are a natural driver in client dialogues, early-stage business discussions, and complex sales processes, contributing deep expertise in the SAP portfolio as well as a strong understanding of clients' business challenges. You are as well able to lead and further develop consulting and IT Services delivery for our clients, bringing your Business Process, SAP S/4 HANA product or Implementation experience and expertise to build relationship and deliver long-term value for our clients (“Land and expand”).
   

  

 At CGI, you are offered the opportunity to grow through both local client deliveries and larger global engagements. Your assignments may range from smaller, short-term initiatives to large, long-term programs. The work is carried out in close collaboration with colleagues—both on-site with clients and from our local offices but involving CGIs near-shore and global SAP delivery capabilities—and is based on established methods and models that provide clarity and confidence for both you and our clients.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 In this role, you will be responsible for:
   

  

* Initiating, building and developing long-term customer relationships, while leveraging and expanding your professional network in the SAP space
* Playing a central role in client and business dialogues, as well as early needs analyses
* Driving the growth of CGI's SAP business by identifying, developing, and realizing new business opportunities and following these into concrete delivery and value for our clients
* Contributing market and customer insights to further evolve our SAP offerings portfolio
* Actively participating in and leading end-to-end sales processes, including RFP responses and proposal work
* Working in a goal-oriented manner and thriving in an environment where follow-up, results, and business outcomes are a natural part of everyday work


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
 To feel confident and succeed in this role, we believe you have:
   

  

* Strong and broad knowledge of the SAP portfolio, for example within S/4HANA, SAP Cloud solutions, and related ecosystems
* Proven experience in business development, client ownership, or similar roles within a consulting or IT-related environment with “One leg in Business Development, one leg in services delivery”
* A solid understanding of the market, customer needs, and how business is created within complex organizations
* An established professional network within the SAP domain or adjacent industries
* Experience working with structured sales and business processes, including proposal work and RFP responses
* A good understanding of “the Business of SAP”, i.e. how to handle relationship, deals and positioning of CGI with SAP as a partner
* Excellent communication skills and confidence in engaging with clients at various organizational levels
* A strong business mindset and the ability to work toward clear goals with structured follow-up
* Fluency in Business English, proficiency in Business Swedish


**Why CGI?**
 At CGI, you become part of a global organization with a strong local presence, where collaboration, long-term commitment, and an entrepreneurial spirit are at the core of everything we do. We offer an environment with significant personal responsibility, the opportunity to influence our SAP journey, and the chance to work alongside highly engaged and skilled colleagues.
   

  

**Want to Learn More?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! Applications will be reviewed continuously, and the position may be filled before the final application deadline. For further questions. please feel free to send your inquiries to Santosh Nimbhorkar, santosh.nimbhorkar@cgi.com or Samuel Auvray, samuel.auvray@cgi.com
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Senior Business Controller
description:
*Vill du ta en central och strategisk roll i en organisation som är ledande inom sakförsäkring? Nu söker vi en Senior Business Controller till Affärsenhet Sak med inriktning mot IT, portföljstyrning och verksamhetsutveckling.* 
*Länsförsäkringar är ledande inom sakförsäkring och SAK-enhetens övergripande uppdrag är att driva försäkringsaffär som kompletterar länsförsäkringsbolagens erbjudande, leverera service samt utveckling och förvaltning till länsförsäkringsbolagens sakförsäkringsaffär.*
**Om jobbet**
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en del av länsförsäkringsgruppen, som består av 23 regionala ömsesidiga skadeförsäkringsbolag. Koncernen bedriver såväl bankverksamhet som verksamhet inom liv- och skadeförsäkring. Du kommer att tillhöra avdelningen Finansiell Styrning & Analys som ansvarar för att på koncernnivå ta fram beslutsunderlag, analyser, prognoser och operativ rapportering till styrelse och företagsledning samt stötta enheterna i det dagliga controllerarbetet.
   

  

 Som Senior Business Controller kommer du att vara ledande Business Controller för avdelning IT och området portföljstyrning och verksamhetsutveckling inom Affärsenhet Sak. Du rapporterar till affärsenhetens utvecklingschef och arbetar nära ledningsgrupp, chefer och controllergrupp inom enheten. Rollen innebär att följa och analysera att finansiella mål uppnås genom att arbeta enligt koncernens gemensamma ekonomiska processer, riktlinjer, analyser och rapportering. Du är en nyckelspelare i att analysera och rapportera finansiella resultat samt att driva förbättringsinitiativ.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

 Finansiell planering och rapportering
   

  

* Vara rådgivare och beslutsstöd till utvecklingschefen på SAK och chefer i att tolka och proaktivt agera på finansiella resultat kopplat till uppdraget, samt förklara hur strategiska beslut påverkar affären.
* Analysera, fastställa och rapportera ekonomiskt utfall i operativ uppföljning. Stötta verksamheten i att styra mot finansiella mål, uppnå löpande effektivisering samt i framtagandet av planer och prognoser.
* Vid behov stödja verksamheten i framtagning och utvärdering av affärskalkyler och investeringar.
* Stöd i frågor kopplat till kostnadskontroll.
* Storytelling och presentationsteknik – en central del av din roll är att kunna analysera och väl anpassat efter behov och mottagare presentera serviceenhetens finansiella resultat/prognos, samt proaktivt föreslå förbättringsåtgärder för att nå satta mål.


 Ekonomistyrning
   

  

* Arbeta nära affärsenheten, koncerncontrollers och övriga business controllers för att säkerställa att koncernens ekonomimodell speglar och är uppsatt utifrån affärens behov, dock alltid utifrån gemensamma principer.
* Ansvar för att tillsammans med controllers driva implementation av gemensamma harmoniserade principer för ekonomistyrning, rapportering och planering vilket inkluderar portföljstyrningen.
* Vid behov utbilda chefer och ledning i aktuell enhet i ekonomiska ansvar och uppföljning. Detta inkluderar att aktivt driva förändringsledning och kontinuerliga förbättringar.


 System och verktyg
   

  

* Aktivt driva och stödja digitaliseringsinitiativ inom finansiell planering och rapportering.


 Vidare har du en central roll i den fortsatta förflyttningen mot det Lean-Agila arbetssättet. LFAB är inne i en pågående förändringsresa där du kommer vara involverad i arbetet att implementera en väl fungerande Lean-Agil utvecklingsmetodik och styrning. Du kommer spela en viktig roll i detta arbete genom att vara med och sätta koncerngemensamma principer för portföljstyrning, samtidigt som du säkerställer affärsenhet SAK:s informationsbehov i arbetet.
   

  

 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Akademisk examen inom ekonomi eller motsvarande.
* Minst 5–10 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet som Business Controller eller i liknande roller.
* Erfarenhet från arbete i en Lean-Agil organisation/struktur.
* Erfarenhet av finansiell planering, rapportering och analys.
* God vana av att arbeta med affärssystem och digitala verktyg.
* Vana vid att arbeta med BI-verktyg och liknande på en avancerad nivå.
* Erfarenhet av och intresse för finansiell analys och styrning av IT- och utvecklingsverksamhet.


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet från försäkring, bank eller finans.
* Erfarenhet av Cognos Analytics och Planning Analytics.
* Erfarenhet av arbete i komplexa organisationer, gärna federativa strukturer.


 Som person är du driven, engagerad och har en stark analytisk förmåga. Du är initiativrik och har lätt för att driva förändring och förbättring, både i stort och smått. Du trivs med att ha många kontaktytor och samarbetar gärna med olika delar av organisationen. Samtidigt är du prestigelös och teamorienterad, men har också förmågan att självständigt ta ansvar och driva komplexa frågor. Du utmanar gärna befintliga arbetssätt och bidrar aktivt till verksamhetens utveckling.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: jenny.rossotti@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: mirek.swartz@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: anna.sandqvist@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund. Genom självstyrande agila team och fokus på kundernas behov utvecklar vi innovativa tekniska lösningar och skapar framtidens kundupplevelse.
   

  

 Hos oss värdesätts samarbete, öppenhet och mångfald, och vi tror att olika perspektiv är nyckeln till lärande och innovation. Vi ger dig tryggheten att vara modig, bidra med nya idéer och påverka både din egen och företagets utveckling.

title: Koordinator till MANN+HUMMEL Vokes Air
description:
*Vill du arbeta i en bred och ansvarsfull roll där kundkontakt, struktur och samarbete är avgörande för framgång? Motiveras du av att vara en nyckelperson i ett dagligt flöde där kvalitet, service och affärsförståelse möts? Då kan detta vara nästa steg för dig.*
 Wise Admin söker nu, för vår kund
 **MANN+HUMMEL VOKES AIR AB** 
 , en
 **koordinator** 
 till ett konsultuppdrag med start omgående. Rollen är placerad i Årsta, strax söder om Stockholm och sträcker sig initialt över sex månader, med ambition till överrekrytering.
   

  

 Hos MANN+HUMMEL kliver du in i ett internationellt bolag med starka värderingar, hög teknisk kompetens och ett tydligt hållbarhetsfokus. Här blir du en viktig del av det dagliga kund- och säljflödet – i en miljö som präglas av tillit, samarbete och ständig utveckling.
   

  

**Plats:** 
 Årsta, arbetstider mån-tors 7-16, fredagar 7-15
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
   

  

**Start:** 
 Omgående
   

  

**Uppdragslängd:** 
 6 månader, med ambition till överrekrytering
   

  

**OM ROLLEN // MAKE IMPACT WHERE IT MATTERS**
 Som koordinator är du en central kontaktpunkt för både nya och befintliga kunder. Du ansvarar för att beställningar, supportärenden och orderflöden hanteras med hög kvalitet och precision – från första kontakt till levererad order.
