* Experience with LLM fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and custom embedding generation,
* Knowledge of orchestration frameworks such as LangChain, Semantic Kernel, or similar tools,
* Exposure to Azure Cognitive Services, Responsible AI practices, or AI governance frameworks,
* Background in data-centric AI, including evaluation and benchmarking of generative model quality.


**Who are you?**
 You are a leader who inspires and motivates those around you, using your influence to drive collaboration and alignment across teams and stakeholders at all levels. You communicate clearly and actively, ensuring that ideas are shared, understood, and acted upon. You embrace experimentation and encourage others to do the same, understanding that innovation often comes from taking calculated risks. You see failure not as a setback, but as a stepping stone – an opportunity to learn, grow, and ultimately achieve better results. Your mindset fosters a culture of curiosity, resilience, and continuous improvement.
   

  

**Why is Permobil the next step for you?**
* You’ll make a difference. Every day. Everything we do leads to understanding and improving the lives of our users. Through our evidence-based innovation, we make a difference to people’s lives.
* You’ll make your mark as part of our future. We collaborate with colleagues across borders to Innovate for Individuals. The impact you make personally could lead change around the world.
* You’ll feel welcome from day one. We’re known for being great colleagues, who are collaborative, fun and at the cutting-edge. Everyone at Permobil cares as much as you do about making a positive difference.


**Application Process**
 We will conduct selection continuously so send us your application today or before
 **January 10th** 
 at the latest!
   

  

 Permobil is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals.
   

  

 For more information about the position, please contact Christoffer Stigson, Director Digital Transformation, christoffer.stigson@permobil.com
   

  

 For information about the recruitment process, please contact Zivile Mitkute, Talent Acquisition Partner, zivile.mitkute@permobil.com
   

  

**Please respect that we do not wish recruitment assistance or advertising, we decline calls from recruitment and advertising providers.**
**More About Permobil**
 Permobil founder Dr. Per Uddén believed that helping people achieve the greatest level of independence is a basic human right and, for over 50 years, Permobil has held fast to that belief. Permobil is a global leader in advanced rehabilitation technology, passionate about better understanding our users’ needs and improving their quality of life through state-of-the-art healthcare solutions. Today, those solutions include power wheelchairs, seating and positioning products, power assist, and manual wheelchairs.
   

  

 Permobil is part of Patricia Industries, a subsidiary of Investor AB, and is headquartered in Sweden. Permobil has 2 000 team members in 18 countries around the world. For more information regarding the company’s storied history and complete product line, visit permobil.com.

title: Data Engineer
description:
På B3 Indes förvandlar vi data till värdefulla insikter som driver förändring och innovation. Vi skapar lösningar inom AI, Business Intelligence, Data Science och Automation för att maximera värdet av data och stärka företags konkurrenskraft. Vår styrka ligger i att kombinera passion för AI och data med en stark laganda, där vi stöttar varandra och löser utmaningar tillsammans.
   

  

**Rollen inom Data Engineering på B3:**
 Hos oss får du chansen att jobba med några av Sveriges mest spännande kunder och projekt. Vad innebär det? Jo, att du får:
   

  

* Gräva i och tillgängliggöra data som inte bara hjälper våra kunder – utan kanske till och med gör världen lite bättre.
* Göra företag mer datadrivna och smartare genom att guida dem i rätt riktning.
* Designar, modellerar och utveckla datalager som bygger på ett eller flera olika källsystem.
* Bygga och implementera avancerade lösningar – och faktiskt se dem göra skillnad!


 Här handlar det inte bara om teknik – det handlar om att modellera, tillgängliggöra och förvalta flöden av data som kan skapa verklig förändring. Vi gillar att tänka stort, experimentera och lösa kluriga problem tillsammans. Och det bästa? Du får ett team av grymma kollegor att bolla idéer med, lära dig av och ha kul ihop med!
   

  

****Det är din passion för** 
 data och analys som gör skillnaden. Utöver det ser vi gärna:**
* Har du en relevant universitetsutbildning? Toppen! Har du kanske skaffat motsvarande kunskaper genom arbetslivserfarenhet? Det funkar lika bra!
* Minst 4 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet – vi letar efter någon som har hunnit samla på sig en del erfarenhet inom området.
* Flytande svenska och engelska – eftersom båda språken används dagligen i arbetet.
* Tidigare konsultroller är ett plus! Har du jobbat som konsult tidigare? Då är det en extra merit, men inget krav.


**Men framför allt...**
 Har du djup erfarenhet av rollen som Data Engineer? Fantastiskt – det är viktigt! Men vi lägger också stor vikt vid din förmåga att se helheten, skapa användbara lösningar men framför allt att du är nyfiken. Om du dessutom har erfarenhet av flera olika moderna ramverk och utvecklarverktyg för t.ex ETL/ELT-flöden, Databaser, Data Warehouse, DataLake, Datamodellering och DevOps – är det ett stort plus.
   

  

 Vi ser även gärna att du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i en eller flera molnplattformar – Azure, AWS, GCP.
* Kanske har du också lite koll på någon av de andra vanligaste BI-verktygen (ex; Power BI eller Qlik)
* Snowflake, Databricks eller något datalager automationsverktyg (ex: TimeXtender eller Wade)
* Viss erfarenhet av att arbeta med arkitektur


**Varför välja B3 Indes?**
 💡
 **Utveckling & karriär** 
 – Väx i en entreprenörsdriven miljö där din kompetens får ta plats.
   

  

 🌿
 **Balans & välmående** 
 – Vi värnar om ditt välbefinnande med stöd för wellness och en flexibel vardag.
   

  

 🚀
 **Energi & gemenskap** 
 – Här präglas kulturen av öppenhet, nyfikenhet och en passion för att skapa något större – tillsammans.
   

  

 ❤️
 **Vi bryr oss – på riktigt** 
 – Vi engagerar oss i samhällsfrågor och samarbetar med initiativ som Suicide Zero, My Dream Now och Pink Programming för att göra skillnad även utanför arbetslivet.
   

  

**En arbetsplats som gör skillnad** 
 :
   

  

 Vi är stolta över att ha utsetts till ett av
 **Sveriges fem främsta karriärföretag 2025** 
 – en utmärkelse som speglar vår energi, nyfikenhet och vårt engagemang för att skapa en inkluderande och inspirerande arbetsplats. Här värdesätts olika perspektiv och idéer, och vi tror att det är just det som gör oss starkare.
   

  

 Hos oss får du friheten att styra över dina uppdrag, din arbetstid och din utveckling. Vi erbjuder
 **konkurrenskraftiga löner** 
 , flexibilitet att forma din vardag och en sund balans mellan jobb och fritid. Och vi vet att
 **gemenskap är minst lika viktigt som teknik** 
 – därför satsar vi på allt från konferensresor och sommarfester till sköna AW:s där vi kan släppa jobbet för en stund.
   

  

**Om B3 Consulting Group**
*B3 Consulting Group är ett expansivt konsultbolag med cirka 1000 medarbetare. Vi brinner för innovation och hjälper Sveriges ledande företag och organisationer att skapa framtidens möjligheter genom digital transformation. B3 finns på* 
 tolv orter i Sverige samt i Polen, med huvudkontor i Stockholm. Bolaget grundades 2003, är noterat på Nasdaq Stockholm Small Cap och omsatte 1 141 MSEK 2023.
   

  

*Vi är stolta över vår prisbelönta företagskultur, där olikheter, erfarenheter och gemensam energi värdesätts. Som ett etiskt och transparent bolag strävar vi efter att ha en positiv påverkan på samhället, människor och miljön. Vi är även engagerade i* 
 Women in Tech och initiativ för att stärka AI-utbildning för kvinnor. 2024 utsågs vi till Årets Employer Branding-företag, och vår HR-chef vann titeln Årets HR-chef.
   

  

**Är du redo att bli en del av ett företag där din passion för AI och data kan göra skillnad? Läs mer om oss och våra möjligheter här!**

title: Legal Engineer - In-House EMEA
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**What You’ll Be Doing**
 Let's get the tricky part out of the way: this role doesn't fit neatly into a traditional box. It's part legal ops, part product specialist, part solutions architect, and part client whisperer. If you enjoy roles that stay static, this probably isn't it. Your mission is to help our clients, some of the most sophisticated in-house legal teams in the world, get the absolute most out of our platform.
   

  

**Some Of What You'll Be Up To**
* Acting as a thought partner to General Counsels, Legal Operations leaders, and in-house teams - building trusted relationships, addressing tricky pain points, and identifying high-value opportunities for them to scale their use of Legora across their legal function.
* Working together with Go To Market and Customer Success in taking full ownership of client relationships - from running pilots with key business units, to onboarding new team members, and ultimately guiding department-wide adoption across corporate legal teams.
* Be the voice of in-house users inside Legora - sharing insights from legal ops teams, commercial lawyers, and compliance functions that directly inform product development, roadmap priorities, and strategic direction.
* Delivering clear, confident product demos and training that bring the power of our platform to life - whether you're presenting to a GC, rolling out to regional teams, or training legal ops professionals.
* Documenting best practices from leading legal departments, contribute to the development of scalable playbooks, and help shape how we grow this function globally.
* Confidently helping in-house teams navigate one of the biggest shifts in how corporate legal operates - from evaluating the ROI and efficiency gains of AI to clearly mapping how AI will impact different functions, from contract management to regulatory compliance.


**What You Bring**
 You come from the world of in-house law; but you've never been content with how things have always been done. You may have worked in a corporate legal department, juggling competing business priorities and doing more with less. Perhaps you've been in legal operations, driving efficiency and transformation initiatives. Maybe you've even moved into legal tech or consultancy, helping in-house teams modernise. Either way, you know how in-house legal teams think, work, and (sometimes) struggle and you're ready to help them level up with technology.
   

  

**You'll Thrive In This Role If You**
* Have a background in law, with experience in an in-house legal team or corporate legal department - ideally with exposure to legal operations, process improvement, or technology implementation.
* Are tech-curious and product-savvy. Not necessarily a coder, but passionate about navigating technical conversations, especially around things like generative AI, technology implementation, innovation and productivity.
* Communicate clearly and confidently with diverse stakeholders, from General Counsels to business leaders, and from lawyers to engineers. I.e. translating across disciplines is second nature to you.
* Bring structure to ambiguity and energy to complexity; and enjoy being the calm, credible presence in a fast-moving environment.
* Understand how to evaluate and improve existing processes as a direct result of new and emerging technologies - whether that's streamlining contract workflows, improving matter management, or enhancing compliance processes.
* Are proactive, self-directed, and comfortable juggling multiple client relationships at once.
* Care deeply about quality, but don't get stuck in perfectionism - you get things done, and you make them better over time.
* Understand the commercial realities of in-house life: doing more with limited resources, demonstrating value to the business, balancing risk and commercial objectives, and being a strategic partner rather than just a cost centre.


**A few more things**
 We're a fast-growing company with bold ambitions, so you'll be joining at a time when things are moving quickly - in the best possible way. You'll have a lot of autonomy, a lot of responsibility, and the chance to genuinely shape how this function evolves. Everyone here has a founder-mentality.
   

  

 If that sounds exciting rather than terrifying, we'd love to hear from you.
   

  

**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Data Engineer
description:
**DATA ENGINEER**
 Would you like to work in an international environment where you’ll make a difference every day? At Permobil, we’re looking for game-changers to join us as we innovate for individuals and develop the world’s most advanced assistive solutions.
   

  

 At
 **Permobil** 
 , the people who use our products come first. Our purpose is to create advanced assistive solutions that make the lives of adults and children living with disabilities more enriching. Our people are passionate about pushing the boundaries of technology to deliver innovations that improve lives. We are a sustainable and responsible business committed to continuous improvement, and our customers can trust us to provide market-leading solutions driven by insights-based clinical data.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 As a
 **Data Engineer** 
 , you play a critical role in building and maintaining the systems that enable reliable, high-quality data across the organization. You will design, develop, and manage the infrastructure that supports our analytics capabilities, ensuring data is accurate, accessible, and secure at every stage. Collaborating closely with business stakeholders, you support the full data lifecycle – from ingestion and cleaning to transformation and preparation – so that insights can be generated effectively. In this role, you will partner with internal teams and external providers, manage incidents and change requests, and create data services and contracts that serve both human users and automated systems. You will also prepare the data foundation needed for upcoming AI initiatives, helping the organization advance toward smarter and more data-driven decision-making.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop, maintain, and optimize the data analytics platform to ensure high performance and reliability,
* Act as a key liaison between internal stakeholders and external partners to align data needs, solutions, and integrations,
* Manage incidents and support change management processes to maintain stable and secure data operations,
* Ensure data quality by securing accurate, accessible, and well-governed data across all systems,
* Design and implement data services, pipelines, and contracts that support both human users and automated systems,
* Build and maintain a robust data foundation that enables and accelerates current and future AI initiatives.


**Qualifications & Skills**
* University degree in IT, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field,
* Solid experience working with Microsoft Power BI and MS SQL Services (SSAS, SSIS, SSRS),
* Strong programming skills, including SQL and Python,
* Proven ability to analyze large and complex data sets using a variety of data and visualization tools,
* Good understanding of business processes with the ability to translate needs into clear reports, dashboards, and insights,
* Strong data modeling skills and experience designing scalable data solutions,
* A structured, logical, and quality-oriented mindset,
* Excellent communication and negotiation skills, including the ability to work with senior stakeholders,
* Commitment to knowledge sharing, best practices, and continuous improvement,
* Ability to work effectively in a multicultural and collaborative environment.


**Meriting Skills**
* Experience in designing and implementing Lakehouse and Data Warehouse architectures,
* Experience working with Microsoft Dynamics 365,
* Familiarity with modern data platforms such as Microsoft Fabric, Snowflake, and Databricks,
* Hands-on experience with MS DevOps and dbt for orchestrating and optimizing data workflows.


**Why is Permobil the next step for you?**
* You’ll make a difference. Every day. Everything we do leads to understanding and improving the lives of our users. Through our evidence-based innovation, we make a difference to people’s lives.
* You’ll make your mark as part of our future. We collaborate with colleagues across borders to Innovate for Individuals. The impact you make personally could lead change around the world.
* You’ll feel welcome from day one. We’re known for being great colleagues, who are collaborative, fun and at the cutting-edge. Everyone at Permobil cares as much as you do about making a positive difference.


**Application Process**
 We will conduct selection continuously so send us your application today or before
 **January 6th** 
 at the latest!
   

  

 Permobil is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals.
   

  

 For more information about the position, please contact Christoffer Stigson, Director Digital Transformation, christoffer.stigson@permobil.com
   

  

 For information about the recruitment process, please contact Zivile Mitkute, Talent Acquisition Partner, zivile.mitkute@permobil.com
   

  

**Please respect that we do not wish recruitment assistance or advertising, we decline calls from recruitment and advertising providers.**
**More About Permobil**
 Permobil founder Dr. Per Uddén believed that helping people achieve the greatest level of independence is a basic human right and, for over 50 years, Permobil has held fast to that belief. Permobil is a global leader in advanced rehabilitation technology, passionate about better understanding our users’ needs and improving their quality of life through state-of-the-art healthcare solutions. Today, those solutions include power wheelchairs, seating and positioning products, power assist, and manual wheelchairs.
   

  

 Permobil is part of Patricia Industries, a subsidiary of Investor AB, and is headquartered in Sweden. Permobil has 2 000 team members in 18 countries around the world. For more information regarding the company’s storied history and complete product line, visit permobil.com.

title: Software Engineer, Network & Service Monitoring Systems
description:
*Eager to drive significant change and see your work make a difference? As a Software Engineer in our Network Data team, you will modernize how we keep our mobile and fixed networks running smoothly. We are transforming our systems with innovative solutions to bring faster insights and smarter automation, ensuring our services are always at their best. This is your chance to solve crucial technical challenges and make a significant, tangible difference to Tele2's core operations.*
 Are you ready to be at the forefront of digital innovation? Join our dynamic team at Tele2, where Digital Capabilities & Technology (DCT) is the engine behind our products and services. As the essential enabler of our commercial ambitions, DCT brings automation and simplicity to the telecommunications industry, revolutionizing the way we connect and communicate.
   

  

 Within our organization, you’ll find everything from the backbone infrastructure of technology and IT systems, serving both our external & internal customers, to advanced analytics, AI creation, and frontend development. Our team plays a vital role in ensuring reliable and premium services through delivering exceptional experiences to our end customers, both Consumer and Enterprises, all the while supporting our colleagues within Tele2.
   

  

**About The Job**
 You will be joining the
 **Network Data department** 
 , the beating heart of the company and which provides systems supporting the implementation, maintainability, and operations of our Fixed and Mobile Networks across Sweden and the Baltics.
   

  

 As a
 **Software Engineer Network & Service Monitoring Systems** 
 , you will be a vital part of a dynamic DevOps team. We build, evolve, and ensure the rock-solid stability of our central network, infrastructure, and service monitoring systems. Your work directly empowers network operations with real-time insights and tools to keep Tele2 running seamlessly.
   

  

 We are on a journey to transform our monitoring landscape, evolving from COTS-heavy solutions towards an agile blend of smart COTS, innovative in-house services, and open-source technologies. Your mission is to dramatically enhance our capabilities, delivering
 **crystal-clear situational awareness** 
 and
 **pioneering automation** 
 to our stakeholders.
   

  

 As part of our commitment to operational excellence, this position involves participation in an on-call rotation for critical incident response.
   

  

 We foster strong team connections through regular in-person collaboration, with our team thriving together for at least three days each week in our Kista office, Stockholm.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We are seeking an experienced Software Engineer who is ready to make a significant impact. You are someone who does not just write great code but understands the bigger picture of system architecture and operational excellence. You will be instrumental part of our teams’ efforts to evolve our monitoring stack, transforming it into a modern, proactive platform for alarm handling, exceptional situational awareness, and robust automation for our Operations Center.
   

  

 You are a natural communicator, effortlessly collaborating within the team and articulating complex ideas clearly to our stakeholders.As our team and stakeholders are multi-lingual, strong English communication skills are essential.
   

  

 To truly thrive and succeed in this role, we believe you have:
   

  

* A knack for navigating diverse system landscapes, with a solid background in both developing and operating solutions that blend commercial off-the-shelf products, custom-built services, and open-source components.
* Strong hands-on programming skills, ideally in languages like Java and Python, allowing you to craft efficient, scalable, and maintainable code.
* Experience building modern, resilient systems using microservices and event-driven architectures, including expertise in API design (e.g., REST, GraphQL), message brokers (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ), and Business Rule Management Systems (e.g. DROOLS).
* Practical familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, and experience with modern deployment and orchestration of applications in on-premises environments.


**What Would Make You Shine (but is not essential):**
* A deep dive into the monitoring ecosystem: Hands-on experience with traditional monitoring tools within a Network and IT Operations context, as well as more modern tools like Prometheus, Grafana or the ELK stack.
* Knowledge and experience of Golang.
* Understanding of relevant network protocols like SNMP, NetFlow, or Syslog, enabling you to extract meaningful insights from vast data streams.
* Experience with real-time event processing or stream analytics, and an understanding of how to reduce alert fatigue through intelligent correlation and automation.
* Familiarity with data integration and migration strategies that help bridge the gap between legacy systems and modern solutions.
* Experience with AIOps Solutions would be a significant asset to our team.


**Beyond the Technical Bits:**
 We value engineers who are inherently curious, proactive problem-solvers, and adaptable to new challenges in a fast-paced environment. You are someone who takes ownership, constantly seeks to learn and improve, and enjoys sharing knowledge within a collaborative team setting. Your ability to think critically about system design and contribute to architectural discussions will be highly appreciated as we shape our future.

title: Sales Development Associate
description:
**Role Purpose**  

The Sales Development Associate is a key daily resource for clients, ensuring the smooth operational execution of client requests and sales activities. This role is vital in building foundational relationships and driving client satisfaction by acting as an internal advocate and ensuring timely, accurate service delivery. The SDA supports the identification and nurturing of cross-sell and upsell opportunities, demonstrating a client-centric mindset through high levels of accountability. The role’s key focus is to enable additional selling time for the seller(s) they are supporting.  

**Key Responsibilities**

  

* Support the identification, qualification and closure of sales opportunities, driving conversion from leads to close particularly for low complexity technology sales, cross-selling, and up-selling.
* Act as a client Subject Matter Expert (SME) providing extended support to specialist business areas e.g., Microsoft EAs, cloud.
* Triage renewals for existing accounts to upsell opportunities and support client retention, collaborating with the Account Executive and producing quotes through to sales order placement.
* Promote online/Global catalogues, manage additions of parts as clients require them and maintain End Of Life products.
* Contribute to sales pitches, bids, deal registration and tenders under guidance.
* Contribute to the account plan (where applicable) under guidance from the account plan owner.
* Contribute to pipeline coverage and growth across accounts.
* Become the client's primary point of contact for support, serving as the 'emotional glue' that ensures customers feel acknowledged and valued.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with multiple stakeholders and be seen as a dependable and trustworthy resource who inspires confidence in others by proactively taking ownership through clear communication.
* Improve customer satisfaction and assist in escalations.
* Ensure adherence to standardized processes (e.g., tiered qualification, procurement rules, framework compliance, escalation paths).
* Proactively collaborate with internal departments for a coordinated, client-focused approach to account growth and to ensure all client requests are picked up within relevant timescales (e.g., Client Operations, Partnerships, Purchasing, POSS etc).
* Utilize internal CRM systems to produce timely and accurate forecasts, pipeline data and maintain client contacts.

**Key skills and experience required:**  

**Sales Cycle Management:**

  

* Basic experience with the sales cycle
* Requires coaching support for managing complex cycles

**Stakeholder Management:**

  

* Foundational ability to engage stakeholders
* Communicates insightful ideas and maintains relationships

**Commercial Acumen:**

  

* Developing understanding of the business environment
* Aware of external factors impacting performance

**Technology Business Acumen:**

  

* Foundational grasp of financial levers and industry trends
* Understands how technology impacts business decisions

**Communication:**

  

* Foundational communication skills
* Adapts style to suit audience and situation

**About Insight:**  

We believe that by giving you the freedom to think big and empower you to reach your full potential, together we will achieve the best outcomes. Along with excellent benefits and a compelling reward package, we offer the opportunity to work in a supportive environment with a high level of autonomy and creativity - there’s a reason our average employee tenure is over 6 years.  

We strive to display our three core values of Hunger, Heart, and Harmony every day. They represent and drive who we are here at Insight and by doing so we are doing amazing things. Insight started in a garage in 1988 and it is through harnessing our three core values that two brothers, Eric and Tim Crown, steered Insight to the Fortune 500 company it is today. We are now a Global IT Services and Solutions business, passionate about helping customers and the real people who sit behind them.  

**Application Details:**  

Insight is an equal opportunity employer, and we are committed to achieving diversity and equality within our organisation. We seek out people from diverse backgrounds and encourage you to apply.  

We will endeavour to contact you within five business days, should we feel your profile is a good match for this role. If you do not hear from us within this timeframe, please presume that on this occasion, your application was not successful.
company_description: Insight is a leader in providing smart, cutting-edge technology solutions for global organizations of all sizes.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
We’re looking for a world-class
 **Sales Development Representative** 
 to join our high-performance sales team, the front line of our growth engine. This is your chance to be part of one of the most effective SaaS sales teams in the Nordics, a team built around high ownership, relentless ambition, and a shared belief that we’re building something truly category-defining.
   

  

 This isn’t an entry-level role. And it’s not just about booking meetings. This is about strategic outreach, combining research, insight, and commercial creativity to identify, engage, and open doors with the right prospects. You’ll be building relationships with senior decision-makers, crafting compelling outreach, and shaping the very first impression of Upsales.
   

  

 You’ll be surrounded by high-performing sales and marketing colleagues, but you own your results. Success here isn’t just about hitting activity metrics, it’s about quality, precision, and the ability to create real pipeline opportunities that convert.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, high-performance environment, who takes pride in mastering their craft, and who wants to grow into strategic software sales.
   

  

 AI first mindset
   

  

 We’re not looking for someone who simply uses AI, we want someone who weaponizes it. You treat tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI copilots as force multipliers, allowing you to deliver at a level and speed others can’t match. For you, AI isn’t an add-on, it’s the default operating system for how you think, work, and lead. You’re relentlessly curious about new capabilities, and you push the limits of what’s possible, turning AI into a competitive advantage for yourself, Upsales, and our customers. This is a role for someone with real ambition: someone who wants to set a new standard for efficiency, precision, and impact in the age of AI.
   

  

 Who We're Looking For
   

  

 You’re experienced enough to know what great prospecting looks like, and curious enough to keep refining it. You’re competitive, thoughtful, and you don’t wait for things to happen, you make them happen.
   

  

**You Have**
* Minimum 2-3 years of experience in B2B sales, outbound prospecting, or business development (ideally SaaS or tech)
* A strong ability to research, prioritize, and engage senior stakeholders
* Proven success hitting or exceeding targets in a structured sales environment
* Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, in Swedish and English
* A results-driven mindset, combined with intellectual curiosity and a growth mentality
* A background in CRM, SaaS, or solution-oriented sales is a plus. More important is your ability to think strategically, execute with precision, and contribute to a winning team.


 Why Upsales
   

  

 Upsales is building the future of B2B growth, combining CRM, marketing automation, and AI to help companies grow smarter and faster. You’ll join a team where high performance is the baseline, ownership is expected, and collaboration is a given.
   

  

 We move fast, we win together, and we’re building something truly category-defining. If you’re ready to take the next step in your sales career, and be part of a team that raises the bar every single day, we’d love to meet you.
   

  

 Upsales is a bootstrapped company with big ambitions, known for our high-performing team, relentless curiosity, and a culture that challenges conventional thinking. From product to sales, we’re obsessed with creating real value for our customers and building software that actually moves the needle.

title: Solutions Consultant
description:
**About The Role And The Team**
 We are seeking a Platform Solutions Consultant to join our Revenue & Operations team in Stockholm. In this role, you will report to the Team Lead, Customer Success and be responsible for fostering customer success by understanding clients' business needs and demonstrating how Adform's innovative products can help them achieve their goals.
   

  

 As a Platform Solutions Consultant, you will be self-sufficient in managing both internal and external stakeholders but will also require guidance and direction from your direct manager. Your exceptional onboarding experience, proactive support, and strategic consultations will enhance customer relationships.
   

  

**We hope you are ready to change the game! Be ready to:**
* Understand the customers business needs and how Adform products help customer reach their goals.
* Drive Adform's commercial success by retaining and growing customer relationships and increase relevant product adoption.
* Be a proactive advisor towards the customer, consult on best practice solutions to meet their goals & objectives.
* Manage new client onboarding and new product rollout for existing clients, ensuring successful delivery within agreed timelines & technical specifications.
* Represent the client needs towards Adform product teams and collaborate with account management and customer success leadership to efficiently escalate relevant topics.
* Proactively educate customers, ensuring optimum platform knowledge and usage on the local market.


**Attitude First. Everything else will follow. We can grow together faster if you have:**
* Strong interpersonal and networking skills, with the ability to influence key technical stakeholders both internally and externally.
* Excellent storytelling and presentation skills.
* Advanced understanding of digital marketing, programmatic media buying, associated tools, and the local competitive landscape, with the ability to identify and leverage USPs against competitors.
* Strong communication skills in both your native language and English, with a customer-oriented attitude.
* Ability to present solutions assertively and translate technical details for non-technical audiences.
* Eagerness to gain broad knowledge of all Adform products and how they can help customers achieve their business goals.
* A strong desire to understand Adform’s internal processes, collaboration best practices, available resources, and to build a robust network with senior stakeholders across regions and functions.
* Adform’s guiding principles ingrained in your profile: Focus on Client Value, Behave with Decency, Take Ownership, Care, Collaborate as a Team Player, Remain Ambitious, and Stand Tall in all interactions.


**Our Promise To You**
* A dynamic, inspiring, and international environment filled with ambitious and caring colleagues.
* Close collaboration with international product, tech, and commercial teams, combined with a fun, social team culture and regular events to connect beyond day-to-day work.
* A competitive salary package based on your qualifications and experience.
* Various benefits, including pension scheme, benefits platform, wellness contribution and social/company events.
* And much more – join us to explore the full experience.


**Diversity & Inclusion @Adform:**
 Adform is an equal opportunity employer with a global perspective. We remain committed to creating an environment that not only respects different backgrounds but celebrates them too. We believe that diversity in all its forms enhances our teams’ creativity, innovation, and effectiveness, and therefore we value different backgrounds, perspectives, and skills.
   

  

 We are committed to creating a work environment where Adform employees feel valued for who they are and what they can contribute, free from any type of discrimination.
   

  

 About UsAdform is the most powerful and safe media buying platform in the world. With a 20+ year history of delivering service excellence and forward-looking technology, Adform enables major brands, agencies, and publishers to create, buy, and sell digital advertising globally. Having pushed the boundaries through augmented intelligence and an industry-leading identity solution, Adform has consistently changed the game for digital advertisers.

title: Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
   

  

****Om rollen****
 Vill du förändra världen? Vi söker en Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager för AWS och/eller GCP, som kommer vara en nyckelperson i att utföra molntransformationer inom AWS / GCP, driva strategiska initiativ på nordisk nivå, vara rådgivare åt CXOs, och bygga högpresterande team. Du kommer ha möjlighet att delta i molnkonferenser, bidra till pre-sales och bygga nätverk med partners som Amazon, Microsoft och Google.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du behöva stödja kunder med molnarkitektur, kunna stödja team i att utföra implementationer av din vision, och successivt ta större ledaransvar för ett växande team. Du kommer ha ansvar som people manager där du kommer vara chef, ha personalansvar, ansvara för rekryteringsmål, och stödja kollegor.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Driva strategi och initiativ inom cloud på nordisk nivå.
* Hjälpa våra kunder med molnarkitektur och cloud native lösningar.
* Använda dig utav generativ och agentisk AI.


*S* 
*om People Manager kommer du att:*
* Personalansvar för ett växande team.
* Ansvara för att sätta riktningen för teamets utveckling, driva affärsutveckling och bidra till tillväxt. Rekrytering och kompetensutveckling är en naturlig del av din vardag.
* Ha fokus på dina teammedlemmars individuella karriärutveckling. Genom regelbundna one-on-one-samtal hjälper du dina konsulter att planera sina karriärer och nå sina mål.
* Du kommer att arbeta nära försäljnings- och leveransteam, andra chefer för att säkerställa att vi levererar högsta värde till våra kunder.


**Din profil**
* Minst 6 års erfarenhet och mycket goda kunskaper av implementation med molntjänster som AWS eller GCP.
* Minst 3 år som molnarkitekt och ansvarig för att sätta upp molnarkitektur, gärna med kunskaper om Amazons tolkning utav CAF, WAF, COM och OCA.
* Kunskap i ett eller flera programmeringsspråk, t.ex. Python, Java, Kotlin, Golang eller Node.
* Intresse för DevSecOps, generativ AI, agentisk AI och cloud-native lösningar.
* En naturlig ledare som vill utveckla andra. Väldigt positivt om du har tidigare erfarenhet med personalansvar.
* Flytande svenska och engelska kunskaper, i både tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI och AWS samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.
* Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.


**Ansökan**
 Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa AWS-team! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!
   

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,1 miljarder euro för 2024.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Cloud Architect - Azure & AI
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtidens molnarkitektur och AI-plattformar i en dynamisk och växande affärsmiljö? Hos oss får du en central roll där tekniskt ledarskap, innovation och samarbete står i fokus. Välkommen till ett kompetent och engagerat team, där du får möjlighet att påverka, utvecklas och skapa verkligt affärsvärde!*
**Om jobbet**
 Som Platform Arkitekt i vårt Public Cloud Platform-team får du ett avgörande ansvar för att modernisera och operationalisera vår Azure molnarkitektur, teknikstrategi och styrning genom tydligt tekniskt ledarskap. Du har en central roll i vår satsning på AI och digital innovation och bidrar till att skapa en framtidssäkrad plattform som möter verksamhetens behov. Du samarbetar nära med kollegor inom Cloud Center of Excellence och är med och driver utvecklingen av vår tekniska miljö. I rollen får du möjlighet att påverka, utvecklas och skapa affärsvärde i en dynamisk och växande organisation där samarbete och ständig utveckling står i centrum.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Bidra med expertis till projekt och stötta verksamheten med molndesign och integrationsmönster
* Utveckla och etablera en modern teknisk plattform för AI och digital innovation
* Ge tekniskt ledarskap och mentorstöd till kollegor
* Dokumentera och optimera molnarkitektur enligt ramverk (bland annat Microsoft CAF, SAF och WAF)
* Hålla dig uppdaterad om nya teknologier och driva förbättringar inom plattformen
* Presentera och leda workshops samt kommunicera teknik och komplexa samband till olika målgrupper
* Samarbeta nära med teamet för att säkerställa leverans och utveckling mot verksamhetens mål


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Djup expertis inom molnarkitektur på Azure (gärna fler hyperscalers)
* Erfarenhet av ramverk som Microsoft CAF, SAF och WAF
* Microsoft-certifiering, gärna Azure Solutions Architect Expert, AI Fundamentals och/eller AI Engineer
* Förmåga att agera som teknisk ledare, mentor och arkitekt med fokus på design och optimering av molnbaserade AI-lösningar
* God kunskap om moderna AI-teknologier (ML Ops, NLP, GenAI) och Responsible AI, inklusive AI-etik, bias och explainability
* Stark erfarenhet av infrastruktur som kod (Terraform, Bicep, ARM)
* God förståelse för CI/CD och DevOps-praktiker
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att bygga förmågor inom Agentic AI och Agentic Coding för att automatisera komplexa arbetsflöden
* Praktisk erfarenhet av containerlösningar som Docker, Kubernetes och OpenShift
* Bakgrund inom systemutveckling eller digital produktutveckling, gärna från bank- eller försäkringsbranschen


 Som person har du förmåga att arbeta under ständig förändring och trivs med att ta initiativ och ansvar. Du är självgående, planerar och coachar teamet mot gemensamma mål och har mod att misslyckas – och att lära dig av det. Med din starka kommunikationsförmåga engagerar du både chefer och andra arkitekter, och din positiva och engagerade attityd bidrar till ett öppet och utvecklande klimat där samarbete står i centrum.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: klaus.seidel@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: lisa-maria.carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Client & Consulting Executive
description:
B2C | COPENHAGEN / AARHUS
   

  

**Do you dream of shaping the future for leading consumer brands? At IMPACT, we’re seeking to strengthen our B2C/Retail Client & Consulting muscles to drive transformative growth for our clients, act as a trusted advisor and strategic partner.**
**About The Job**
 This is your unique opportunity to play a central role in defining digital roadmaps, nurturing high-level relationships, and steering complex programs with purpose and clarity. You will own client relationships and lead the charge on consulting engagements, while partnering with C-level leaders (CDOs, CMOs, CIOs, etc.), identifying new growth opportunities and ensuring project success and stakeholder alignment. Working hand-in-hand with our delivery teams, you will help clients unlock the power of digital to meet their ambitions - today as well as into the future.
   

  

 The position at IMPACT is for you, who thrives to
   

  

* Turn ambition into action by designing bold digital strategies and roadmaps that truly move the needle for our clients.
* Lead the charge on high-impact consulting engagements in the fast-evolving worlds of retail, D2C, and omnichannel.
* Fuel growth by spotting and seizing opportunities to expand client partnerships through smart cross- and upselling initiatives.
* Be the trusted voice that digital leaders turn to guiding C-level decision-makers and middle managers alike with confidence and clarity.
* Inspire and align teams by orchestrating complex projects, delegating with purpose, and creating a collaborative, energized environment.
* Pitch ideas that win, shaping standout business proposals that captivate clients and deliver measurable results.
* Own the outcome driving satisfaction, retention, and performance across a portfolio of clients generating €1–5M+ annually.


 YOUR PROFILE
   

  

 You are experienced within leading complex digital commerce transformations, driving strategic consulting across retail, D2C, and omnichannel landscapes, while building strong, trust-based client relationships.
   

  

 Thus, we expect you to demonstrate
   

  

* A strategic mindset with strong communication and analytical skills
* A natural connector who builds trust with clients and teams alike
* Experience with omnichannel, loyalty, personalization, and digital transformation
* Proven ability to drive business development and innovation


 We imagine you have 5-8 years' experience in management consulting or project/program leadership with a strong focus on Commerce. Additionally, you could have an educational background within IT, business, finance, or management (BSc or MSc).
   

  

 Finally, we are looking for a colleague and team member who can contribute to a fun and professional work environment at IMPACT while ensuring a high standard in collaboration with your colleagues.
   

  

 LIFE AT IMPACT
   

  

 For more than 20 years, IMPACT has pioneered some of the most advanced commerce solutions in the Nordics. What started in Aarhus, Denmark has grown into a European powerhouse with offices across the world.
   

  

 While we cover all the major tech platforms and work with some of the most exciting businesses, we make a sincere effort to stay down-to-earth. It’s who we are, and it’s the kind of talent we want to attract. We empower people and businesses to drive positive change and quality experiences, and we’re not afraid to take the lead on shaping the future of commerce.
   

  

 Today, we’re a global team of digital talents working to strategize, craft, and support all things tech. We push the boundaries for commerce with curiosity, ambition, and empowerment that cements the ambition to
 **change commerce for the better** 
 . But it’s not all about size. Because more than anything, we want to maintain our collective can-do attitude that creates a working environment where everything is possible – and have fun while doing it.
   

  

 CONTACT
   

  

 Sound like an opportunity for you? Send your CV via the link below.
   

  

 Interviews are held on an ongoing basis, as the position is to be filled as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact Executive Search Specialist Christian Kerrn-Jespersen +45 23299249.
   

  

 We are looking forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 For more than 20 years, IMPACT has pioneered some of the most advanced commerce solutions in the Nordics. What started in Aarhus, Denmark has grown into a European powerhouse with offices across the world.
   

  

 Today, we’re a global team of digital talents working to strategize, craft, and support all things tech. We push the boundaries for commerce with curiosity, ambition, and empowerment that cements the ambition to
 **change commerce for the better** 
 . But it’s not all about size. Because more than anything, we want to maintain our collective can-do attitude that creates a working environment where everything is possible – and have fun while doing it.

title: AI Engineering Manager
description:
We are on a mission to become the leading international force in residential property management. What we do matters to billions of people in their everyday lives.
   

  

 Residential real estate is the world’s largest asset class, and for most families, buying a home is the single biggest financial decision they will ever make. For too long, residential property management has fallen short of homeowners' and residents' expectations, and the industry is ready for change. Odevo was formed to make that change happen.
   

  

 In just six years, Odevo has grown more than 70-fold, establishing us as the leading international player. We are more than 12,000 people across the US, the UK, the Nordics, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Mexico, and Italy building Odevo. Together, we aspire to break new ground through innovation and cultivate a workplace where we help each other succeed, where ideas matter more than titles, and where kindness is a strength.
   

  

 By combining the power of people and technology, we set a new standard for how homes are managed. Our technology-enabled services simplify living for residents and create a better experience for property owners and boards.
   

  

 Our ambition is to continue our fast-growing journey through new customers, service expansion, and by partnering with great companies that share our mindset and ambition, both in existing and new markets.
   

  

 As we continue to grow, we stay true to who we are, challenge unnecessary bureaucracy, and keep decision-making close to our customers.
   

  

 If you share our mindset and ambition, we’d love you to join us and help accelerate our mission together.
   

  

**The Role**
 Are you a passionate and experienced leader with a deep interest in AI and a drive to build high-performing teams? We are seeking an Engineering Manager to lead and inspire a team of talented AI Engineers in developing cutting-edge, AI-driven solutions.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to be at the forefront of innovation, shaping how our organization leverages the power of AI to revolutionize the property management industry. You will foster a culture of collaboration, creativity, and technical excellence while guiding your team to deliver impactful results.
   

  

 You will lead a Stockholm-based team of eight AI Engineers, with additional hiring underway, working in a hybrid setup with three days per week in the office.
   

  

 You will be reporting to the Head of Engineering and work closely with the Head of AI Product.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Will Include**
**Team Leadership and Development**
* Lead by example as a hands-on engineering manager, able to dive into design discussions, code reviews, and experimentation when it adds value.
* Foster a collaborative, high-performing, and innovative engineering culture within the AI team.
* Mentor, coach, and empower engineers at different seniority levels, supporting both technical depth and growth.
* Own the full performance and development cycle for your team, from setting clear expectations and goals to giving regular, actionable feedback and performance reviews.
* Build and maintain a healthy, inclusive team environment, addressing challenges early and enabling people to do their best work.
* Partner with recruitment to attract, assess, and onboard experienced AI Engineers.


**Strategy and Cross-functional Collaboration**
* Collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, and other stakeholders to define and evolve the technical roadmap and strategy for AI initiatives.
* Translate product and business objectives into a clear set of priorities for the AI team, ensuring strong alignment with the overall product vision.
* Represent the AI team in engineering forums and strategic planning sessions, clearly communicating progress, risks, and trade-offs.
* Stay informed about emerging AI trends and technologies and bring relevant insights into high-level technical discussions and long-term planning.


**Who You Are**
* You are a proven leader with a passion for AI and a track record of building and managing high-performing engineering teams.
* You possess strong communication and interpersonal skills, capable of effectively collaborating with both technical and non-technical colleagues.
* You are a strategic thinker with a pragmatic approach, able to translate complex business requirements into actionable technical solutions.


**Qualifications**
* Significant experience in leading and managing software engineering teams
* Solid background in hands-on software development
* Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
* Professional proficiency in Swedish and English, given our interactions with colleagues across the globe.
* Deep interest in AI and how it’s changing our world.
* Experience with our tech environment (Cloud services/AWS/GCP, Python/FastAPI, LLMs like GPT-5/Gemini/Claude) is a plus, but not mandatory.


**What We Offer**
* Professional growth - to work with the most talented developers in the industry.
* Modern technology - we invest in the latest technologies and tools and encourage our team members to share their ideas and take ownership of their work.
* Innovation - to work on exciting projects that push the boundaries of our industry and make a real impact.
* Commitment to quality - a dynamic and forward-thinking company that values profitable and long-term product development.


 #msl

title: Sales Development Representative - Belgian and Dutch markets
description:
**Be a Key Player in the Future of Telematics – Apply as a Sales Development Representative at ABAX!**
 Do you have a talent for building relationships, love talking to people, and enjoy opening doors to new opportunities? Then we have the perfect role for you!
   

  

 Our Stockholm office is expanding – and we’re now looking for an ambitious, results-driven
 **Sales Development Representative** 
 to strengthen our growth. In this role, you’ll be focusing on the
 **Belgian and Dutch markets** 
 , which means we’re looking for someone fluent in
 **Dutch or Flemish** 
 . You may already have experience in sales, or perhaps you’re at the start of your career and eager to develop in a role with great potential. With us, you’ll have the chance to grow alongside a successful team in a fast-moving and future-focused organisation.
   

  

**What does the role involve?**
 As a Sales Development Representative at ABAX, you’ll be the crucial first point of contact for our future customers. You’ll be the face of the company and play a central role in our sales journey. Your mission? To book high-quality meetings for our Account Executives, laying the foundation for strong customer relationships.
   

  

 You’ll be part of a passionate team where we support one another, celebrate successes, and work towards shared goals.
   

  

**Your responsibilities:**
* Prospect and identify new business opportunities – with the phone as your main tool.
* Book relevant meetings with the right decision-makers.
* Work closely with the sales team – you’re a key player in creating a first-class customer journey from the very first contact.
* Build your pipeline and work strategically to hit your targets.
* Work smart! Use our CRM tools, reporting systems, and training platform to work more effectively and achieve results faster. We give you the tools – you create the results!
* Drive our growth by booking meetings that lead to new customers.


**Who are you?**
 You’re an energetic person who sees opportunities where others see obstacles. You’re motivated by results, enjoy challenges, and are always looking to develop.
   

  

**We believe you:**
* Have experience in proactive sales or eager to learn.
* Are goal-oriented, structured, and self-driven.
* Communicate fluently in both Dutch and/or Flemish and English.
* Enjoy working in a team but are also confident in taking your initiative.
* Identify with our values: enthusiastic, customer-focused, innovative, and sustainable.


 Do you also have experience in SaaS, telematics, leasing, service sales, or similar? That’s a big plus – but not a requirement.
   

  

**What do we offer you?**
 At ABAX, you don’t just get a job – you get a career opportunity. Here, we value collaboration, innovation, and a joyful workplace.
   

  

 We offer:
   

  

* Comprehensive onboarding through ABAX School
* Competitive salary + bonus scheme
* Private healthcare and insurance
* An inspiring work environment in our modern office in Stockholm


 You’ll be working in a fast-growing international company – where no day is the same, and where your ideas and energy make a real difference.
   

  

**Background Checks & References:**
 Employment at ABAX depends on receiving satisfactory references.
   

  

 As part of our recruitment process, we carry out digital reference checks via RefApp, an online solution.
   

  

 Please note that a background check may also be conducted alongside the reference check.
   

  

**Equal Opportunities:**
 At ABAX, we are committed to creating an inclusive working environment for all our colleagues. This commitment also extends to ensuring our recruitment routines and processes are as inclusive as possible. We encourage applicants from all backgrounds to join us and contribute to strengthening our focus on equality and diversity in the workplace.
   

  

**About ABAX**
 ABAX is a leading European telematics IoT platform offering connected mobility solutions for vehicle tracking, tool tracking, and equipment control. Our mission is to deliver mobility data insights that empower people to do more with less.
   

  

  

  

 With over 500,000 tracked assets and 40,000 customers, ABAX delivers reliable and powerful solutions for businesses relying on physical operations. Our advanced platform transforms customer needs into actionable insights and automated reporting, driving efficiency and operational excellence.
   

  

  

  

 We operate across Europe, with over 350 employees working from our facilities in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, the Netherlands, Belgium, Poland, and the UK. Our Head Office is in Larvik, Norway.

title: Anaplan Solution Architect
description:
Spaulding Ridge is an advisory and IT implementation firm. We help global organizations get financial clarity into the complex, daily sales, and operational decisions that impact profitable revenue generations, efficient operational performance, and reliable financial management.
   

  

 At Spaulding Ridge, we believe all business is personal. Core to our values is our relationships with our clients, our business partners, our team, and the global community. Our employees dedicate their time to helping our clients transform their business, from strategy through implementation and business transformation.
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced
 **Anaplan Solution Architect** 
 to join our
 **Anaplan Delivery** 
 team in Europe.
   

  

**The role**
 The Anaplan Solution Architect will design best-in-class Anaplan solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of our clients. You will develop and cast the technical vision to internal model-building consultants, and most importantly, to our clients, as we work to deliver the best possible solution to their challenges. Your design will account for data sources, integration layers, the underlying Anaplan model architecture, and the user interface, and you will have the opportunity to coach and train others along the way!
   

  

* Work as a Solutions Architect and lead the end-to-end design of an Anaplan Model
* Run a project utilising the Agile Implementation Methodology
* Teach both clients and internal teams with no prior Anaplan knowledge how to build a model.
* Guide a customer to enhance their process utilising both Anaplan expertise and Subject Matter Expertise.
* Have difficult conversations with a customer about scope and timeline to ensure the project timeline is on track and the budget
* Effectively lead a team of consultants


**You have:**
* Sound experience in Consulting or Financial Reporting, and Analysis
* Strong knowledge of Excel. Including an understanding of how to develop macros, and model large data sets utilising Lookups and SumIf functions.
* Microsoft Office Suite expertise
* Strong understanding of Multi-Dimensional data architecture and data integration
* Previous experience with other EPM technologies


**We take care of you!**
 As an employee of Spaulding Ridge, you will be part of a company that provides innovative opportunities to impact our clients in a meaningful way positively. We believe giving back is core to our values and as part of this effort, you will be given the opportunity to participate in different opportunities throughout the year, including SR’s day of service, giving back to our global community.
   

  

**Please note we are unable to offer visa sponsorship for this role.**
**Spaulding Ridge’s Commitment to an Inclusive Workplace**
 When we engage the expertise, insights, and creativity of people from all walks of life, we become a better organization, we deliver superior services to clients, and we transform our communities and world for the better.
   

  

 At Spaulding Ridge, we believe our team should reflect the rich diversity of society and we take seriously the responsibility to cultivate a workplace where every bandmate feels accepted, respected, and valued for who they are. We do this by creating a culture of trust and belonging, through practices and policies that support inclusion, and through our employee led Employee Resource Groups (ERGs): CRE (Cultural Race and Ethnicity), Women Elevate, PROUD and Mental Wellness Alliance.
   

  

 The company is committed to offering Equal Employment Opportunity and to providing reasonable accommodation to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with Spaulding Ridge and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to our VP of Human Resources, Cara Halladay (challaday@spauldingridge.com). Requests for reasonable accommodation will be considered on a case-by-case basis.
   

  

 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status or disability.

title: Senior fullstackutvecklare C#/Javascript/SQL till team Produce - Ving
description:
**Till Ving söker vi en skicklig och driven fullstackutvecklare som vill vara en del av ett team där kvalitet, samarbete och teknisk innovation står i fokus.** 




  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Vi söker en fullstackutvecklare till team Produce. Teamet ansvarar för system som hanterar hotell, flyg och tillval. Det innefattar bland annat system för att planera, producera, optimera och hantera flygkapacitet och avgångar, både för kommande och pågående säsonger. Teamet bygger och ansvarar för flera affärskritiska system.
 



  





 Teamets teknikstack innefattar bland annat:
 


* C#
* SQL
* Redis
* Azure Service Bus
* React
* Azure



  





 Hos oss jobbar vi agilt i snabba releasecykler och med continuous delivery. Teamen ansvarar för hela kedjan – från kravförståelse och utveckling till driftsättning, förvaltning och support. Vår strategi är ”Cloud first”, vilket gör att vi värdesätter kunskap om molnlösningar och Azure.
 



 Tillsammans med teamet får du stort inflytande över arkitektur, skalning och prestanda i våra egenutvecklade system.
 



  





 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:
 


* Samverka med stakeholders för att förstå behov och krav
* Designa och utveckla lösninga
* Säkerställa kvalitet genom t.ex. kodgranskningar och tester
* Automatisera infrastruktur och releaseflöden i Azure med IaC (Bicep m.m.), CI/CD samt observability practices
* Arbeta tillsammans med andra team för att leverera på helheten



  





**Vår tekniska miljö** 




 Vi är 13 utvecklingsteam på IT-avdelningen i Stockholm som tillsammans driver utvecklingen framåt. Våra system byggs i en modern Microsoft-miljö och vi arbetar med aktuella tekniker, ramverk och verktyg som .NET Core, C#, Node, Azure, React, React Native, JavaScript, GraphQL, MS SQL och Redis.
 



  





 I linje med vår cloud-first-strategi satsar vi på skalbara och framtidssäkra lösningar där innovation, prestanda och kvalitet alltid står i fokus.
 



 Läs mer om
 **vår IT-avdelning här** 
 🧑 💻
 



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Vi söker dig som är nyfiken, noggrann och kommunikativ, och som trivs med att arbeta tillsammans med andra. Du brinner för kodning, ser värdet i samarbete för att nå gemensamma mål och tycker det är viktigt att förstå den verksamhet vi stöttar. Du har förmåga att arbeta proaktivt, se helheten och driva utvecklingen framåt.
 



 Du har en god förmåga att kommunicera och samarbeta med dina kollegor, dela kunskap och bidra till en öppen och lärande kultur.
 



 Vi söker en lagspelare som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap, stöttar kollegor och bidrar till en öppen och lärande kultur. Vi värdesätter om du har intresse för DevOps och tycker om att arbeta med frågor som rör automatisering, CI/CD och infrastruktur som kod.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer:** 



* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av systemutveckling inom C#/.NET
* Intresse av arkitektur
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade tjänster (gärna Azure)
* Erfarenhet av React eller liknande
* Relevant högskole- eller universitetsutbildning
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i agila team
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift



  





**Meriterande** 



* Azure kompetens
* Erfarenhet av att automatisera infrastruktur och releaseflöden i Cloudmiljö (IaC, CI/CD)
* Erfarenhet av övervakning och monitorering
* Testdriven utveckling (TDD)
* Parprogrammering
* Intresse för generativ AI och förmåga att driva frågor inom området
* Erfarenhet av DevOps och förmåga att driva frågor inom området



  





**Vi erbjuder** 




 Vi erbjuder en spännande och utvecklande miljö. Du får en omväxlande vardag tillsammans med härliga kollegor - vi arbetar i nära samarbete med andra team och verksamheten för att ge våra gäster de bästa veckorna på året. Vi har ett högt medarbetarengagemang och en härlig kultur. Vi älskar vårt jobb och välkomnar dig ombord på vår resa i Nordic Leisure Travel Group!
 



 Läs mer om
 **vad vi erbjuder här** 
 🏄
 



  





**Övrigt** 




 Tjänsten är en heltidstjänst och placerad på Vings fina huvudkontor på Kungsholmen i Stockholm. Det är möjligt med distansarbete upp till 2 dagar per vecka när det passar för teamet/arbetsuppgiften.
 



  





 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
 



  





**I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av tester från Alva Labs – ett logiskt problemlösningstest och ett personlighetstest. Testerna utgår från vedertagen forskning och ger oss möjlighet att på ett mer objektivt sätt bedöma dina styrkor och eventuella utmaningar i relation till aktuell tjänst. Du får mer information när du skickat in din ansökan, men om du är nyfiken redan nu kan du läsa mer hos** 
**Alva Labs** 
**.** 




  





**Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en bakgrundskontroll att genomföras.** 




  





**🏄 ♂️ Kul på jobbet** 




**🤝 Tjänstepension** 




**🌎 Reseförmåner** 




**🦉 Utveckling och lärande** 




**💗 Well-being** 




**💼 Hybrid arbetsplats** 




  





  





*Ving ingår i den nordiska resekoncernenNordic Leisure Travel Group.* 




*I gruppen ingår researrangörerna Ving Sverige, Ving Norge, Globetrotter, Spies i Danmark, Tjäreborg i Finland, flygbolaget Sunclass Airlines samt våra egna hotellkoncept Sunwing Family Resorts, Ocean Beach Club och Sunprime Hotels. Gruppen säljer ett normalt år runt 1 250 000 resor i de nordiska länderna.*

title: SharePoint-specialist
description:
**Har du erfarenhet av att balansera robusta tekniska lösningar med en användarvänlig struktur? Då är det dig vi letar efter!**
 Som
 **SharePoint-specialist** 
 på B3 Cloud ansvarar du för utveckling, förvaltning och optimering av plattformar inom Microsoft 365 med särskilt fokus på SharePoint. Rollen innebär ett nära samarbete med våra kunder för att skapa effektiva, säkra och användarvänliga lösningar.
   

  

*Du kommer bland annat:*
* Förvalta och optimera digitala samarbetsplattformar inom Microsoft 365
* Utveckla skräddarsydda lösningar inom SharePoint och Microsoft 365
* Designa och implementera informationsarkitektur och strukturer för dokument och innehållshantering
* Säkerställa hög kvalitet genom kodgranskning, testning och dokumentation
* Vägleda och stötta våra kunder i användning av Microsoft 365-tjänster
* Delta i arkitektur- och teknikval för långsiktigt hållbara lösningar


*Vi söker dig som:*
* Har 6 års erfarenhet av utveckling och optimering av Microsoft 365-miljön
* Innehar goda kunskaper i Microsoft 365, med särskilt fokus på SharePoint
* Har erfarenhet av design av informationsarkitektur och dokumenthantering i större miljöer
* Är strukturerad, analytisk och lösningsorienterad
* Har god förståelse för dokumenthantering, informationssäkerhet och migrering av system
* Är service- och relationsinriktad med ett starkt kundfokus
* Kan flytande svenska i tal och skrift då det krävs i det dagliga arbetet


**Vilka är vi?**
 Vi är B3 Cloud, ett härligt gäng med specialistkunskaper inom molntjänster utspridda i Göteborg och Stockholm. Som en del av B3 Consulting Group har vi resurser, kompetens och stöd i ryggen samtidigt som vi bibehåller dynamik och flexibilitet med korta beslutsvägar. Vi tror på att dela kunskap, stötta varandra och ständigt utvecklas tillsammans – både som team och som individer.
   

  

 Vi är stolt över att vara del av en verksamhet som präglas av inkludering och en strävan efter att ha en positiv påverkan på samhället, människor och miljön. Vi värdesätter olikheter och erfarenheter och arbetar kontinuerligt med inkludering och kultur för samarbete och respekt.
   

  

*Vi erbjuder:*
* Frihet och flexibilitet att påverka din utveckling, arbetstider och uppdrag
* Kompetensutveckling genom utbildningar, certifieringar och lunchföreläsningar
* Konkurrenskraftig lönemodell och en otroligt flexibel samt förmånlig RAM modell.
* En givande företagskultur med konferensresor, AW:s och wellness-aktiviteter

title: Senior Solution Architect Dynamics 365 Finance
description:
*Vi har en stark position inom Data & AI samt Business Application och nu söker vi dig som har gedigen erfarenhet av Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att leda utvecklingen av framtidens lösningar och driva vår strategi mot autonoma ERP, tillsammans med några av branschens främsta experter.
   

  

 Låter det spännande? Då är den här rollen något för dig!*
 Din roll hos oss
   

  

 Du leder designmöten och workshops, coachar kollegor och säkerställer att våra lösningar gör verklig skillnad för kund. Vi arbetar agilt i harmoni med Microsofts arbetssätt (FastTrack, Solution by Design) och vårt eget ramverk DAM – Digital Adoption Model, baserat på Scrum. Hos oss jobbar vi alltid i teamleveranser – vi tror på att det ger bäst resultat för både kund och medarbetare.
   

  

 Vi vill jobba med dig som
   

  

 Har gedigen erfarenhet av Dynamics 365 Finance och har en bred ERP-profil med förståelse för exempelvis finansprocesser inom fastighetsbranschen, detaljhandel eller industri.
   

  

 Du gillar digitala utmaningar och vill skapa nästa generations verksamhetsprocesser med fokus på automatiserade flöden. Din analytiska förmåga, kommunikativa styrka och erfarenhet gör dig till en självklar ledare i våra projekt.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Har ca 7+ års erfarenhet av implementationsprojekt inom Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain
* Har ansvarat för arkitekturdesign och säkerställt att lösningar möter affärsbehov
* Är van vid agila projekt och vill bidra till att utveckla vårt arbetssätt


 Vårt team
   

  

 Hos oss möter du en blandning av engagerade och ödmjuka människor med olika bakgrund och intressen. Vi värdesätter humor, glädje och gemenskap, och ser till att du får utrymme för både professionell och personlig utveckling. Genom kompetensdelning och teamaktiviteter blir vi tillsammans de vassaste konsulterna på marknaden – och skapar den energi som behövs för att bidra med förändring hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Kompensation och förmåner
   

  

 Vår förmånspolicy är utvecklad för att möta både dina professionella och personliga behov. I vårt omfattande förmånspaket ingår friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension och sjukvårdsförsäkring. Vår ersättningsmodell består av en konkurrenskraftig fast del och en rörlig del som ger dig möjlighet att påverka din lön baserat på din prestation och ambition. Detta ger dig frihet att balansera din ersättningsnivå med dina livsprioriteringar.
   

  

**Nyfiken?** 
 Hör av dig till oss – vi tar gärna en kaffe och berättar mer: amir.hosseini@accigo.se
   

  

 Accigo är ett konsultbolag som hjälper företag och organisationer med digital affärs- och verksamhetsutveckling med tekniken som möjliggörare. För oss handlar digitalisering till 90% om människor och 10% om teknik. Det är när samspelet mellan människa och teknik fungerar som digitaliseringens fulla styrka visar sig.
   

  

 För många handlar digitalisering mest om teknik. För oss är det så otroligt mycket större. Digitalisering kan få både människor och organisationer att våga sikta högre, följa sina drömmar och öppna dörrar som de inte ens visste fanns. Och när man ser igenom tekniken och börjar skönja vilka möjligheter som gömmer sig där bakom. Då ser man att framtiden kan vara en fantastisk plats – fylld av mänsklig energi och värme – och digitalisering är inget annat än vår superkraft för att komma dit.

title: Senior systemutvecklare
description:
*Vill du arbeta med moderna tekniker och bidra till digital innovation inom bank och försäkring? Hos oss får du en nyckelroll i ett engagerat utvecklingsteam där självledarskap, lärande och samarbete står i fokus.
