Här får du möjlighet att påverka både plattformens utveckling och kundupplevelsen – samtidigt som du utvecklas tillsammans med kompetenta kollegor i en öppen och inkluderande miljö.*
**Om jobbet**
 Som senior systemutvecklare arbetar du i ett tvärfunktionellt team med ansvar för att designa, utveckla och driftsätta digitala tjänster och plattformar inom bank och försäkring. Du arbetar gärna med både frontend och backend, och har särskilt ansvar för att plattformen är stabil, säker och utvecklarvänlig. Du bidrar aktivt till verksamhetens digitalisering genom att arbeta med molnbaserade lösningar och kontinuerligt förbättra kodbas och processer. Arbetet sker enligt agila metoder, med dagliga standups och nära samarbete med kollegor.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Utveckla och implementera nya funktioner och tjänster (frontend och backend)
* Automatisera tester och arbeta testdrivet
* Utveckla integrationer och API:er
* Hantera support och incidenter
* Delta i sprintplanering och utvärdering
* Designa och driftsätta lösningar i molnmiljöer (Azure, AWS, Google Cloud)
* Förbättra plattformen utifrån nya tekniker, säkerhetskrav och lagstiftning
* Ansvara för centrala applikationer/minitjänster och bidra till strategiska plattformsbeslut


 Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:
   

  

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom datavetenskap, systemvetenskap eller likvärdigt område
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet som systemutvecklare
* Erfarenhet av tvärfunktionella team och helhetsansvar för utvecklingsprocessen
* Mycket goda kommunikationsförmågor på svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift
* Djup kunskap i Java (primärt), .NET/C#, SQL
* God kompetens av frontend: JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, HTML5, CSS3, React, Webpack
* Erfarenhet av molnlösningar (Azure)
* Erfarenhet av Azure DevOps och CI/CD
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med integrationer och API-utveckling
* God kunskap kring automatiserade tester och testdriven utveckling


 Meriterande är även om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av WCAG och tillgänglighetsanpassning
* Testautomation frontend (Selenium, Cypress, Jest)
* Grundläggande UX-design och verktyg (Figma)
* Erfarenhet av plattformsutveckling och ansvar för centrala applikationer
* Erfarenhet av säkerhets- och analysverktyg
* Certifiering inom Java, .NET eller relevanta ramverk
* Certifiering inom molntjänster


 Som person är du nyfiken, engagerad och driver förbättringsarbete, samtidigt som du är problemlösande, ödmjuk och stödjande mot kollegor. Du tar ansvar för ditt eget lärande och bidrar till en inkluderande och innovativ miljö.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: per.augustinsson@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: lisa-maria.carensjo@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

*Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.*
 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Digital & IT är hjärtat i Länsförsäkringsgruppens digitala utveckling. Vi driver den gemensamma digitala transformationen och levererar förstklassiga IT-lösningar, datadrivna insikter och innovativa digitala tjänster som skapar värde för hela verksamheten. Vårt uppdrag är att bygga en robust och framtidssäker IT-miljö – både på plats och i molnet – som möjliggör kundnära och effektiva affärer i hela gruppen.
   

  

 Hos oss möts teknik, affär och innovation. Vi arbetar tvärfunktionellt ute i verksamheten i agila team där utveckling, drift och strategi går hand i hand. Vi ansvarar för allt från IT-styrning, enterprisearkitektur och leverantörshantering till applikationsutveckling, cybersäkerhet och verksamhetsberedskap.

title: Software and Application development engineer and Analysts
description:
**The job's roles & responsibilities include:**  

* Technical lead of Agile team consisting of Function Owner & Developer for brake control systems; prioritize work items in daily stand ups as well be in charge of story priorities and also the entire PI plan for the Team. Secure team delivery for the prioritized programs in time and in good quality

**Technical Skills we expect:**  

* On Senior level applies advanced knowledge typically obtained through education and work experience (position typically requires min 5 years relevant experience).
* Vehicle Dynamics base knowledge required
* Team leading & organizing talent; great communicator who is effective at planning & prioritizing tasks.
* Fluent in English; written & verbal
* Driver license valid in Sweden (B required / C desired)

title: Hardware Engineer – HIL Test Objects (Connected Experience)
description:
### **Role Description**


We are looking for a Hardware Engineer to work hands-on with Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) test objects in a modern connected/infotainment and software-defined vehicle context. You will build, operate, maintain, and continuously improve HIL hardware used by developers and testers—acting as a key link between hardware, software, and system design to ensure test objects are reliable, current, and representative of real vehicle behavior.

### **Responsibilities**

**HIL Hardware Build & Operation**

* Build, configure, and commission HIL test objects according to electrical and system design.
* Own day-to-day operation of HIL rigs, ensuring high availability and stable performance.
* Perform hardware bring-up, validation, and troubleshooting during ramp-up and changes.

**Fault Tracing & Debugging**

* Investigate and fault-trace hardware issues in HIL environments independently and in collaboration with software/system engineers.
* Analyze failures and “fault slip-throughs” to identify root causes in hardware, wiring, configuration, or design.
* Propose and implement corrective actions to prevent recurrence.

**Software & Configuration Management**

* Ensure HIL test objects run correct and up-to-date software, firmware, and configurations.
* Support software deployment, updates, and rollback in HIL environments.
* Collaborate with developers and testers to verify correct HW/SW interaction.

**Design Feedback & Continuous Improvement**

* Feed back learnings from HIL usage, failures, and limitations to improve designs over time.
* Identify gaps between test object design and real-world behavior and help close them.
* Improve robustness, serviceability, and scalability of HIL hardware setups.

**Collaboration & Support**

* Work closely with system engineers, software developers, test engineers, and suppliers.
* Support users of HIL environments by diagnosing issues and advising on correct usage.
* Document hardware designs, configurations, known issues, and best practices.

### **Requirements**

* Hands-on experience working with hardware systems (preferably in test, validation, or embedded environments).
* Strong skills in fault tracing, debugging, and root-cause analysis of hardware issues.
* Experience with electrical systems, wiring, connectors, ECUs, and/or test equipment.
* Ability to work independently and take ownership from build to daily operation and maintenance.
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across disciplines.
* Professional proficiency in English (expert level).

### **Nice to Have**

* Experience with Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) or similar test setups.
* Understanding of embedded software, firmware updates, and HW/SW integration.
* Experience from automotive development and/or complex system testing.

### **Start / Duration**

* **Start:** 2026-03-09
* **Duration:** Until 2026-12-31

### **Location**

* **Location:** Gothenburg, Sweden (on-site)

-----------------------------


Rasulson Consulting is a specialized staffing and recruitment firm within the IT sector. We partner with established technology companies as well as innovative startups to offer attractive career opportunities for professionals looking to grow within digital development and IT. With our strong technical expertise and extensive network, we effectively match the right consultant with the right assignment. At Rasulson Consulting, you will receive personalized guidance, ongoing feedback, and the opportunity to take the next step in your career.

title: Technical Sales Engineer
description:
Reynaers Aluminium create sustainable buildings with high-quality aluminium solutions. With a wide range of products, we improve the living and working environment of people, now and for generations to come. We are now looking for a Technical Sales Engineer to join our team in Helsingborg.



Reynaers Aluminium is a leading European specialist in the development and marketing of innovative and sustainable aluminium solutions for windows, doors, curtain walls, sliding systems, sun screening and conservatories. Driven by energy-efficiency and the willingness to take responsibility for the environment.



Besides standard solutions, Reynaers Aluminium also develops tailor-made solutions for all market sectors – from residential to commercial and industrial projects. The systems meet the most stringent demands in terms of comfort, security, architectural design, and energy-efficiency.



**What are we looking for?**
----------------------------


**Duties and responsibilities**



As a Technical Sales Coordinator for Reynaers Aluminium your main tasks include:


* Support customer with technical knowledge in the sales process.
* Increase the usage of digital solutions offered from Reynaers.
* Train customers in Reynaers software and solutions such as ReynaPro & Digitrace and help prepare quotations. Help making partners self-sufficient and comfortable in software and systems.
* Technical support to customers giving advice on solutions, systems, and processes.
* Together with KAM Sales managers, you will visit costumers and fabricators.
* Improve customer relationship and with other partners of Reynaers.
* Propose cost effective technical solution based on project requirements; in close collaboration with Project Departments from Reynaers Headquarters.
* Prepare project files (in Reynapro software) with drawings, calculations and other related documents.
* Thermal and strength estimation and calculations.
* Active work in CRM system.
* Reports to General Manager-Nordics.
* Frequent communication with Reynaers HQ departments and with different stakeholders in the projects such as architects and consultants.
* Education: Construction Engineer or similar (building physics)

  

  

The list of activities for this position is not limited to the above-mentioned activities.


**Who are you?**
----------------


**As a person**



You are organized, result oriented and have a structured mind-set. You are a team player, competitive and self-reliant with a “down to earth” mentality. To go out of your comfort zone to make business grow and develop, is natural for you and something you are comfortable with. You always want to walk/go the extra mile to give customer the best service. You are a people-oriented person. We value personality highly in this recruitment.

  


**To succeed in the role**


* Be able to work in an international environment and handle different cultures.
* Meritorious to have Knowledge and Know-how of how the business of system suppliers for facade & window solutions operates.
* Meritorious to Understand the methodology of the aluminium & steel systems for facade and window solutions.
* Meritorious knowledge in using design software’s for aluminium and steel systems for facade and window solutions.
* Capable to work in Excel, Word, Outlook.
* Capable to use AutoCAD software’s or similar.
* Fluent in English.
* Overseas travel required will occur from time to time.
* Be able to plan and hold training session of different kinds within the technical business scope.
* Worked in similar roles for 2-3 years.
**Who are we?**
---------------


**Additional information**



Location: Regional office in Helsingborg  

Form of employment: Permanent  

Starting date: By agreement  

Traveling: Included in the work  

Required: Full driving license and valid passport

  

**Your application**



You apply for the position via our recruitment system, so that we can handle your application according to GDPR. We use continuous selection and would like you to send your application as soon as possible, but no later than 2024-09-01.  

  

For more information about the position and the recruitment process, you are welcome to contact:  

Pernilla Dehlin 0761 19 93 09  

pernilla.dehlin@managementpartners.se

title: Senior Web Developer
description:
At Umain, we're not just creating software; we're crafting the future, one innovative project at a time. With our motto "Shape, Ship, Scale," we empower our team to not only envision the future but also play a pivotal role in building it. We're a dynamic team where you can shape the future, ship groundbreaking solutions, and scale your abilities in many different ways.
   

  

 We're on the lookout for senior developers ready to join us in this journey, bringing passion, creativity, and dedication along with them. The role is relatively broad and focused on web technologies, where we offer the opportunity to work on many interesting projects on modern web stack technologies.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A chance to work on unique projects that explore and push the boundaries of what's possible.
* A fun and fair work environment where your you have the opportunity to expand your skills through unique challenges and fantastic colleagues.
* A personal coach, and a setting where you can grow professionally and personally.
* Being part of multidisciplinary teams, participating in agile teams, being an important player in a highly ambitious setting.


**As a Senior Web Developer at Umain, your role will involve:**
* Use modern frontend frameworks such as NextJS, Svelte, or Flutter to create amazing digital experiences.
* Engaging with backend languages and frameworks like Go, Rust, or Kotlin to craft scalable integration middle layers.
* Working with contemporary SaaS headless CMS and E-commerce platforms including Centra, Shopify, and MedusaJS.
* Participating in projects & teams alongside major brands and large organizations, and contributing to emerging tech trends and innovations.


**Who You Are**
* You're a developer with a passion for innovation and a knack for problem-solving.
* You're eager to learn, grow, and take on new challenges.
* You value collaboration, diversity, and the opportunity to make a significant impact.
* You believe in the power of technology to shape the future.
* You have worked professionally as a Web Developer for at least 5 years.


**Why Umain?**
* Career Framework:


 We believe in fairness and clarity, which is why we've established a transparent career framework to ensure equal pay and equal opportunities for all. Your growth and success are as important to us as they are to you. Together with your coach, you will build your own development plan and grow in your career.
   

  

* Work-Life Balance:


 At Umain, diversity is our strength. We understand that life doesn’t pause when you walk into the office. That's why we've cultivated an environment that supports an excellent work-life balance. We welcome team members from all walks of life, recognizing the richness that different backgrounds, ages, and life stages bring to our team. We're committed to supporting each other, encouraging a healthy work-life balance that respects your needs, whether it's taking care of your family, your pets, or yourself.
   

  

* Innovations and Learning:


 Technology is always evolving, bringing new challenges and opportunities for collaboration and learning. Our developers work closely with designers, analysts, testers and more to tackle these challenges head-on, sharing knowledge and growing together.
   

  

* Skills Over Degrees:


 We’re more interested in what you can do than in the diplomas you hold. Talent, drive, and creativity are what count at Umain. Here, you’ll find opportunities to grow, learn, and excel in your career, regardless of your educational background. If you have the ambition and commitment to succeed, we have the environment and resources to support your journey.
   

  

**Are you ready to SHAPE, SHIP, and SCALE with us?**
 If you're a developer who thrives on innovation, values a supportive and inclusive workplace, and is eager to make a tangible impact on the future, we’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something awesome together.
   

  

***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our internal People Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our* 
 internal policies
 *. The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Software Engineer, Network & Service Monitoring Systems
description:
*Eager to drive significant change and see your work make a difference? As a Software Engineer in our Network Data team, you will modernize how we keep our mobile and fixed networks running smoothly. We are transforming our systems with innovative solutions to bring faster insights and smarter automation, ensuring our services are always at their best. This is your chance to solve crucial technical challenges and make a significant, tangible difference to Tele2's core operations.*
 Are you ready to be at the forefront of digital innovation? Join our dynamic team at Tele2, where Digital Capabilities & Technology (DCT) is the engine behind our products and services. As the essential enabler of our commercial ambitions, DCT brings automation and simplicity to the telecommunications industry, revolutionizing the way we connect and communicate.
   

  

 Within our organization, you’ll find everything from the backbone infrastructure of technology and IT systems, serving both our external & internal customers, to advanced analytics, AI creation, and frontend development. Our team plays a vital role in ensuring reliable and premium services through delivering exceptional experiences to our end customers, both Consumer and Enterprises, all the while supporting our colleagues within Tele2.
   

  

**About The Job**
 You will be joining the
 **Network Data department** 
 , the beating heart of the company and which provides systems supporting the implementation, maintainability, and operations of our Fixed and Mobile Networks across Sweden and the Baltics.
   

  

 As a
 **Software Engineer Network & Service Monitoring Systems** 
 , you will be a vital part of a dynamic DevOps team. We build, evolve, and ensure the rock-solid stability of our central network, infrastructure, and service monitoring systems. Your work directly empowers network operations with real-time insights and tools to keep Tele2 running seamlessly.
   

  

 We are on a journey to transform our monitoring landscape, evolving from COTS-heavy solutions towards an agile blend of smart COTS, innovative in-house services, and open-source technologies. Your mission is to dramatically enhance our capabilities, delivering
 **crystal-clear situational awareness** 
 and
 **pioneering automation** 
 to our stakeholders.
   

  

 As part of our commitment to operational excellence, this position involves participation in an on-call rotation for critical incident response.
   

  

 We foster strong team connections through regular in-person collaboration, with our team thriving together for at least three days each week in our Kista office, Stockholm.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We are seeking an experienced Software Engineer who is ready to make a significant impact. You are someone who does not just write great code but understands the bigger picture of system architecture and operational excellence. You will be instrumental part of our teams’ efforts to evolve our monitoring stack, transforming it into a modern, proactive platform for alarm handling, exceptional situational awareness, and robust automation for our Operations Center.
   

  

 You are a natural communicator, effortlessly collaborating within the team and articulating complex ideas clearly to our stakeholders.As our team and stakeholders are multi-lingual, strong English communication skills are essential.
   

  

 To truly thrive and succeed in this role, we believe you have:
   

  

* A knack for navigating diverse system landscapes, with a solid background in both developing and operating solutions that blend commercial off-the-shelf products, custom-built services, and open-source components.
* Strong hands-on programming skills, ideally in languages like Java and Python, allowing you to craft efficient, scalable, and maintainable code.
* Experience building modern, resilient systems using microservices and event-driven architectures, including expertise in API design (e.g., REST, GraphQL), message brokers (e.g., Kafka, RabbitMQ), and Business Rule Management Systems (e.g. DROOLS).
* Practical familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, and experience with modern deployment and orchestration of applications in on-premises environments.


**What Would Make You Shine (but is not essential):**
* A deep dive into the monitoring ecosystem: Hands-on experience with traditional monitoring tools within a Network and IT Operations context, as well as more modern tools like Prometheus, Grafana or the ELK stack.
* Knowledge and experience of Golang.
* Understanding of relevant network protocols like SNMP, NetFlow, or Syslog, enabling you to extract meaningful insights from vast data streams.
* Experience with real-time event processing or stream analytics, and an understanding of how to reduce alert fatigue through intelligent correlation and automation.
* Familiarity with data integration and migration strategies that help bridge the gap between legacy systems and modern solutions.
* Experience with AIOps Solutions would be a significant asset to our team.


**Beyond the Technical Bits:**
 We value engineers who are inherently curious, proactive problem-solvers, and adaptable to new challenges in a fast-paced environment. You are someone who takes ownership, constantly seeks to learn and improve, and enjoys sharing knowledge within a collaborative team setting. Your ability to think critically about system design and contribute to architectural discussions will be highly appreciated as we shape our future.

title: Data Engineer
description:
På Fortnox är data hjärtat i vår förmåga att hjälpa företag starta, växa och utvecklas. Vi befinner oss i ett expansivt skede där vi bygger framtidens dataplattform: en cloud miljö som hanterar transaktionsdata från över en halv miljon svenska företag, processar miljontals händelser per minut, och omvandlar denna massiva datamängd till handlingsbara insikter, avancerad AI och analyslösningar för en utvecklingsorganisation med över 50 team.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en
 **Data Engineer** 
 som inte bara vill utveckla och optimera pipelines, utan som vill vara med och designa hur vår dataarkitektur ska se ut imorgon
 **.** 
 Du kommer spela en nyckelroll i att säkerställa att vår data är välstrukturerad, lättillgänglig och redo att driva både affärsbeslut och nya innovationer.
   

  

**Detta kommer du att få**
* Designa och vidareutveckla vår dataplattform och arkitektur att skala i takt med en expansiv verksamhet.
* Arbeta end-to-end med datalösningar – från strategi och planering till implementering, driftsättning och långsiktig governance.
* Utveckla och underhålla robusta data pipelines och integrationer i cloudmiljöer.
* Driva initiativ kring datasäkerhet och compliance i nära samarbete med team inom säkerhet och juridik.
* Stötta och samarbeta med Data Scientists, Analytiker och Utvecklare för att demokratisera data i hela organisationen.
* Bidra till en kultur av lärande – sprida kunskap och expertis samt påverka hur vi bygger upp vår Data & Analys-funktion.


**Vad du behöver för att anta uppdraget**
 Vi söker dig som drivs av att se data omvandlas till insikter och värde. Du gillar att ta ägandeskap och har förmågan att hantera komplexa projekt med både precision och framåtdrift i en snabbt växande organisation . Att vara en del av vårt team innebär att du driver förändring där det behövs, både i vår infrastruktur och i våra arbetssätt.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har:**
* 3-5 års relevant erfarenhet i rollen som Data Engineer eller liknande.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Python eller SQL.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av datainfrastruktur och arkitektur i cloudmiljöer (gärna GCP, men även andra är meriterande).
* Erfarenhet av verktyg och system som t.ex. DBT, Fivetran och BigQuery
* Meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att bygga integrationer mot datakällor som Postgres och Kafka.


**Som person är du:**
* Initiativrik och självgående – du ser vad som behöver göras och driver uppgifter framåt.
* Strukturerad och detaljfokuserad, men kan samtidigt tänka i nya banor och se helheten.
* Analytisk och en problemlösare med förmågan att kommunicera komplexa insikter till både tekniska och icke-tekniska stakeholders.
* Flexibel och trivs i en föränderlig miljö. Du värdesätter teambaserat arbete och bidrar till en positiv, lärande kultur.


**Vi erbjuder dig:**
* Möjlighet till stor påverkan på Fortnox uppföljning och hur vi bygger vår dataplattform i en mycket expansiv fas.
* Teknisk utveckling genom att samarbeta med erfarna och kompetenta utvecklare och specialister.
* Generösa möjligheter till kompetensutveckling, som konferenser, utbildningar och tid för egenutveckling.
* Flexibelt arbete: Vi tror på flexibilitet – du kan jobba på distans eller på något av våra kontor i Växjö (huvudkontor), Malmö, Linköping eller Stockholm.


 Välkommen att vara med och forma vilka vi är imorgon.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Summer Internship at ABB P&P
description:
På
 **ABB** 
 hjälper vi industrier att bli mer resurseffektiva och renare – och varje person här bidrar till resultaten. Du kommer att få möjlighet att leda, få stöd att växa och kunna vara stolt över den påverkan vi skapar tillsammans. Gå med oss och hjälp till att driva det som driver världen.
   

  

**Denna Position Rapporterar Till**
 R&D Team Lead
   

  

 \_\_
   

  

 We are looking for a motivated and curious summer worker to support our team during the summer period. In this role, you will gain hands-on experience in a professional environment and work closely with experienced colleagues, quality and production. The position is well suited for you as a student at the beginning of your career who is eager to learn, take responsibility, and contribute to daily operations.
   

  

 The summer job consists of building a prototype for measurement data collection (temperature), where an existing sensor will be used and the surrounding existing electronics need to be adapted. Software to receive streaming data needs to be written, and possibly also signal‑processing algorithms.
   

  

 Another part involves further developing an experimental setup aimed at solving a “temperature‑measurement problem.” Based on an IR sensor with multiple pixels, you will assemble the electronics and sample data using C code and Python/Matlab. From this data, you will compensate for heating disturbances that reach the sensor and model the “true” temperature of the object being measured.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Build a prototype for data acquisition based on existing hardware
* Write C-code to handle streaming data from existing API
* Use micro-controller to collect data
* Store and post-process the data.
* Conduct various measurements and document results
* Subject to time available, investigate various methods for disturbance rejection.


**Additional Information**
 [Period: June-August 2026]
   

  

 [Location: Stockholm / Kista]
   

  

 [Work arrangement: On-site]
   

  

**Our Team Dynamics**
 Our teams support each other, collaborate, and never stop learning. Everyone brings something unique, and together we push ideas forward to solve real problems. Being part of our team means your work matters - because the progress we make here creates real impact out there.
   

  

 För att bygga en renare och smartare framtid krävs alla sorters människor: de nyfikna, de modiga och de kreativa. Därför välkomnar vi människor med alla bakgrunder och erfarenheter.
   

  

 Är du redo att göra skillnad?
   

  

 Ansök idag eller besök
 **https://www.abb.com** 
 för att lära dig mer om hur våra lösningar påverkar hela världen.
